title: Engineering Manager
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
 As an
 **Engineering Manager** 
 in Candy Crush Soda Saga's Gameplay and Monetisation Domain, you'll combine line management with hands-on technical leadership across the systems that define how Soda is played, rewarded, and monetised. Your work spans core gameplay mechanics, monetisation flows, content delivery at scale, and the internal tooling that powers them.
   

  

 King's second largest game, Candy Crush Soda Saga, is loved by millions of players worldwide, matching Swedish fish, rescued Soda gummy bears, and popped soda bottles to win points, defeat obstacles and progress through almost 20,000 levels. We're an iconic team growing a sweeter future for one of the biggest casual mobile IPs in the world through attracting the world's best talent. Our ambition is to continue crushing it for our players when it comes to creativity, product, and technology!
   

  

**Your Role Within the Kingdom**
* Reporting to the Domain Engineering Lead, you'll line-manage and grow a group of engineers working across multiple feature teams in Gameplay and Monetisation - hiring, onboarding, performance management, mentoring and coaching. You'll help each engineer develop their craft and career, and contribute to building stronger connection, clarity, ownership and psychological safety across the Domain.
* Partner with Product Managers, Design and Creative, QA and engineering peers to shape and deliver roadmaps - coordinating dependencies across feature teams, aligning on longer-term plans, and ensuring your Domain's work aligns with Soda's product vision and goals, and fits cleanly into the broader game and platform ecosystem.
* Provide hands-on technical leadership in Gameplay and Monetisation, contributing to the codebase on a regular basis - as an IC or Tech Lead embedded within a feature team. Review designs, surface technical risks early, guide architectural choices, and balance speed and quality against Soda's broader technical direction and shared technology platforms.
* Represent Gameplay and Monetisation in cross-domain and cross-Soda engineering forums - sharing learnings, contributing to shared engineering standards and ways of working, and bridging your engineers into the wider tech community at King.
* Champion a strong experimentation culture - using A/B tests, live data and player insights to drive technical and product decisions, and ensuring the engineers you support feel accountable for measurable player and business outcomes.


 Soda is a large, mature C++ codebase that has been delivered to millions of mobile players for over a decade. You'll work with purpose-built internal tooling for content, level design and live configuration, alongside King's shared platforms for analytics, experimentation and live operations.
   

  

**Experience**
**Skills to Create Thrills**
* Experience leading and developing software engineers, including performance management, career growth and day-to-day coaching in a product development environment.
* Strong technical background, able to engage deeply in design and architecture and contribute to a C++ codebase on a regular basis.
* Track record of planning and delivering complex technical solutions, balancing short-term needs with longer-term architectural and product goals, ideally in a high-scale or game-as-a-service context.


**Knowledge & Skills**
* Strong grasp of modern software engineering practices (testing, code review, CI, observability) and a track record of contributing to and upholding shared engineering standards.
* Proficiency in C++ and the ability to reason about mobile performance, memory, frame-time budgets, and stability at scale.
* Comfort working in an experimentation-driven environment - able to design, interpret and act on A/B tests, and to use live data to guide technical decisions.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with non-technical partners, translating between technical and business perspectives and aligning stakeholders around clear, practical plans.


**Key Attributes**
* Values-based, team-first leader with a down-to-earth, collaborative style who leads by example and builds trust across disciplines.
* Comfortable operating amid ambiguity: able to move forward when priorities or requirements are still evolving, make pragmatic trade-offs, and adjust course as you learn.
* Curious, proactive and outcome-focused, with a strong sense of ownership for both your team's health and the impact of your team's work on players and the business.


**How We Work**
 Our Team First, Hybrid Working model empowers teams across the Kingdom to decide how they want to work together, with a mix of in office and home working.
   

  

 If you're excited about this role but don't meet every single requirement, we'd still love to hear from you. We know that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds may hesitate to apply unless they match every point, and we're interested in your potential as well as your experience.
   

  

**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Tekniker inom 2nd line support
description:
Eccera söker nu supporttekniker med minst två års erfarenhet av IT-support på 2nd line nivå till uppdrag hos en kund som behöver stärka sin 2nd line support.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



 Uppdraget är på heltid och kommer att pågå tills vidare.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Som tekniker inom 2nd line support kommer du arbeta med att ta emot och lösa incidenter samt problem som eskalerats från 1st line. Du kommer att arbeta nära verksamheten och ärendena löser du via telefon, remote och onsite. Att lösa de mer komplexa problemen med hjälp av grundlig felsökning är en stor del av arbetet. Du kommer att arbeta med dagligt installations- och serviceunderhåll, säkerhetslösningar samt supportarbete på utrustning samt i system och applikationer såsom Microsoft 365, Azure och Intune.
 



  





**Din profil och kvalifikationer** 




 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har arbetet i minst två år med liknande arbetsuppgifter och inom IT i fem år. Som person har du ett strukturerat tankesätt med uppmärksamhet på detaljer. Du är tekniskt kunnig, en riktig lagspelare samt talar och skriver svenska och engelska flytande.
 



  





*Krav* 




 • Erfarenhet av djupare felsökning
 



 • Goda kunskaper inom Microsoft 365 och Azure
 



 • Erfarenhet av Windows Server 2016 och uppåt – uppsättning och underhåll
 



 • God nätverksförståelse
 



  





*Meriterande* 




 • Erfarenhet kring olika backuplösningar
 



 • Erfarenhet av virtualisering
 



 • B-körkort
 



  





 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar. Vi genomför regelbundet spännande och roliga aktiviteter där du som konsult får möjlighet att träffa och umgås med dina kollegor under trevliga och avslappnande former.

title: Senior Consultant - Business Analysis
description:
**Roboyo AI is a category shaper in Applied AI and Agentic Automation.**

 We help leading enterprises move from automation projects and AI experiments into governed, production-grade systems that execute real work across workflows, processes, products and services.
 

  
 





 Our heritage is in scaled enterprise automation; our future is Applied AI and Agentic Automation: autonomous agents, AI engineering squads, process orchestration, data and knowledge foundations, and human-in-the-loop governance embedded deeply into how our clients operate.
 

  
 





 We are not here to sell AI theatre. We are here to turn AI into working systems, measurable outcomes and repeatable transformation programs.
 

  
 




  
 



**Senior Consultant - Business Analysis** 



 Location: 
 **Stockholm (hybrid - in person some days of the week)** 




**About Roboyo**

  
 



 Are you ready to be part of something extraordinary? We're not just another tech or consulting company — we're a powerhouse of innovation, energy, and ambition. Our mission? To revolutionize the way businesses work through AI, Agentic AI, intelligent automation, and digital transformation. And we're doing it with the best team in the game. We're looking for passionate people who want to shape the future with us.
 



 We work with the world's leading AI technologies — including OpenAI, Microsoft, UiPath, Google, AWS and more — to build high-impact, value-driven solutions that truly make a difference for our clients. From developing a tailored AI strategy to implementing and operating scalable solutions, we deliver end-to-end support that drives real business transformation.
 



  
 


**Who Are You?**

  
 

 We are looking for a motivated and entrepreneurial
 **Senior Consultant** 
 with 2–4 years of experience working within digital transformation initiatives, AI solutions, low-code platforms, or platform-specific development environments. In this role, you will combine responsibilities across project coordination, business analysis, product ownership, and stakeholder management. You will work closely with both clients and internal teams to drive digital initiatives from concept to implementation in a dynamic startup environment where initiative, accountability, and self-leadership are highly valued.
 


**What You Will Do**

  
 

  
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead and support digital transformation initiatives focused on AI, automation, and low-code solutions
* Gather, analyze, and document business and functional requirements
* Collaborate with developers, business stakeholders, and cross-functional teams to ensure successful delivery
* Act as a bridge between business and technology teams
* Support prioritization, planning, and execution of digital products and transformation projects
* Contribute to agile delivery processes and continuous improvement initiatives Take ownership of deliverables and proactively drive initiatives forward



**Required Qualifications** 



* 2–4 years of experience in consulting, digital transformation, business analysis, product ownership, project coordination, or similar roles
* Experience working with AI-related projects, low-code platforms (such as Appian or Mendix), or platform-specific development
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced startup environment
* Relevant university degree or equivalent higher education qualification
* Fluent in English, both written and spoken



  
 



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with Appian
* Experience with Mendix or similar low-code platforms
* Knowledge of agile frameworks and methodologies
* Experience with requirements gathering and backlog management in agile environments
* Understanding of automation, workflow optimization, and digital process transformation



  
 


**What We Offer** 

  
 


* Opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI and digital transformation initiatives
* A collaborative and entrepreneurial startup environment
* High degree of responsibility and influence
* Professional growth and career development opportunities



**In addition to:** 



* 30 days of vacation, flexible & hybrid work setup, and a great office in the center of Stockholm.
* Regular team activities, employee wellness benefits, and company pension schemes.
* International projects, global mobility (work abroad temporarily!), and, if needed, relocation support.
* A place where you can be yourself, make an impact, and help us shape the future…



  
 




**Sounds like your kind of challenge? Then
 

 let’s
 

  shape the future together!**





*Roboyo is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are committed to building diverse, inclusive teams.*

  
 




  
 



 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.
 



**Privacy Notice:** 
 By applying, you consent to the processing of your personal data for recruitment purposes in line with our Privacy Policy: https://roboyo.global/data-privacy/

title: AI Platform Engineer
description:
We are super excited to announce that our IT Manager Olivia Ivkovic is looking for an AI Platform Engineer to join Voyado’s Information Technology team.
   

  

 At Voyado, becoming an AI-native company is one of our biggest strategic priorities. We’re building AI into the way we work — not as a side project, but as part of our internal infrastructure — with the goal of making AI genuinely useful across the organization through smart integrations, reliable tooling, automation and scalable internal platforms.
   

  

 This is not a traditional AI Engineer role focused on training models or building customer-facing AI products. Instead, you’ll work close to cloud infrastructure, integrations, internal tooling and applied AI — helping build the technical foundation that enables AI usage across the company.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Information Technology at Voyado owns Claude Enterprise and ChatGPT company-wide. We are not waiting for a separate AI team to hand us something to run — we are building the platform, integrations and tooling ourselves.
   

  

 As AI Platform Engineer, you’ll sit at the intersection of cloud infrastructure, systems integration and applied AI. A large part of the role is about connecting systems, enabling workflows and building reliable internal AI capabilities that people across Voyado can actually use in their daily work.
   

  

 This is a hands-on builder role. You’ll work with APIs, integrations, orchestration, internal tooling and automation across systems such as Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Slack, Jira and cloud platforms in Azure and AWS.
   

  

 Some of the things you'll be up to:
   

  

* Building and maintaining AI solution on top of the internal AI platform and integration layer
* Connecting AI tools to internal systems, data sources and workflows
* Developing internal AI assistants and automations that reduce manual work
* Working with APIs, orchestration frameworks, RAG patterns and data pipelines
* Improving scalability, reliability, security and governance across AI tooling
* Collaborating with Information Security and Cloud CoE on standards and architecture
* Experimenting with new AI capabilities and moving valuable ideas into production


 So, who are you?
   

  

 We’re not looking for someone who has already done this exact role before — the space is evolving too quickly for that. What matters most is that you have a strong technical foundation, enjoy solving systems problems and are genuinely curious about how AI can be applied in practice.
   

  

 You’re probably someone who naturally thinks in integrations, workflows and infrastructure rather than isolated tools. You enjoy connecting systems, automating repetitive work and building solutions that are both practical and scalable.
   

  

 We believe you likely have experience with several of the following:
   

  

* Cloud infrastructure in Azure and/or AWS
* APIs, integrations and event-driven architectures
* Writing production-grade code, not just scripts
* Internal tooling, automation or platform engineering
* Data pipelines, structured/unstructured data and RAG patterns
* Identity and access management in Microsoft environments such as Entra ID / Azure AD


 We also think you:
   

  

* are curious about AI and actively experiment with new tools and workflows
* move fast while still building things others can maintain and understand
* are comfortable working without fully defined requirements
* think proactively about security, governance and operational reliability
* enjoy building things that make other people’s work easier


 What's in it for you?
   

  

 Voyado wouldn’t be the powerful platform it is without the people behind it. We really care for our Voyadoers and some examples of what we can offer you are:
   

  

* An engaged team with a knowledge-sharing and friendly culture
* Summits where we hang out, workshop, discuss, and have a good time together
* Opportunities for personal and professional growth and learning in a dynamic and supportive environment.
* Work-life balance – we don't have a long work-hours culture, we value engagement over hours worked.


 Some of our benefits:
   

  

* 30 days of vacation, so you can spend time on the things you love
* Beneficial bike lease, including e-bikes
* Breakfast buffet on Fridays
* Inhouse gym only for Voyadoers
* A generous gadget-and-phone package (your choice!)
* 5000 SEK per year in wellness allowance
* Parental leave top-up additional support for new parents
* A wellness hour you can use every week


**About Voyado**
 Voyado is the agentic CX suite for retail. We help retailers of all sizes to create exceptional experiences – from first click to lasting loyalty. Our products help retailers understand customers, predict behaviors, and deliver personalized journeys that drive conversion and loyalty.
   

  

 With offices in Sweden, the UK, Germany, and the Netherlands, we work with hundreds of leading retailers like H&M, Stronger, Nudie Jeans, and Power. Voyado is backed by Viking Global Investors, Novax, Verdane, eEquity, and H&M Group.
   

  

**Be yourself 🏳️‍🌈**
 At Voyado, we believe in gender equality. We are proud sponsors of Womengineer as well as Tjejer Kodar! Read more about Tjejer Kodar & Voyado here
   

  

  

  

 Equality is not only about gender but also about making everyone feel welcome and heard in a multicultural and diverse environment. We at Voyado strive to make everyone feel like they can bring their true self to work every day. Gender-equal and diverse teams have more perspectives on life and bring different ideas to the table which in the end leads not only to making a better working environment but also a better product.
   

  

 Ready to find out more?
   

  

 Lovely! 🎉
   

  

*Before one applies it can always feel like you need a better resume, more polish, or just another year of experience, but we say if you think this sounds like a place where you can shine don't hesitate to send in your resume!*
**Making it personal with AI**
 We truly believe you’ll position yourself best for success in the interview process by being yourself with support from AI where it makes sense, later in the process you will even be expected to use AI. But at the end of the day, what matters is meeting you, the person behind the application.
   

  

 There is no such thing as a perfect candidate; we’re all human so please, bring your authentic self! Don’t let AI over polish your CV or answers to the point where we can’t hear your real voice because that’s what we care about the most.
   

  

*Note: As of right now we are unable to proceed with applicants outside of the EU, and a requirement of eligibility to work at Voyado is the right to work in the EU without limitations. Needless to say, this is something we are actively working on to be able to onboard colleagues from all over the world.*
 In today’s hyper-competitive market, we help over 500 retail brands across 100 markets attract, convert, and retain loyal customers.
   

  

 With AI-driven CRM, loyalty, e-commerce personalization, and retail media, Voyado turns every interaction - online or in-store - into lasting growth.
   

  

 By combining customer data with product intelligence, we empower retailers to deliver the right message, product, or offer at exactly the right time. The result? Stronger customer relationships and measurable business impact.

title: Infrastrukturtekniker
description:
Vill du vara med och stärka Sveriges försvarsförmåga genom avancerad teknik och innovation? Vår kund söker nu ett helt IT-infrastrukturteam som vill vara nyckelspelare i arbetet med att utveckla och förvalta tekniska tjänster som är kritiska för företagets verksamhet. Din roll kommer att vara avgörande för att säkerställa tillgängligheten, säkerheten och stabiliteten i deras system och digitala tjänster.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Teamet som du kommer att ingå i kommer att hantera en viktig IT-infrastrukturplattform för ett av våra kunds affärsområden, vilket är avgörande för förvaltning och utveckling av tekniska tjänster. Ett betydande fokus kommer att ligga på att säkerställa tillgängligheten till systemet, vilket kräver höga standarder för säkerhet, stabilitet och noggrannhet.
 



  





 Som person förväntas du vara organiserad och van vid att ta ansvar. Du är en person som agerar och är noggrann i dina åtaganden samt strävar efter att göra ett utmärkt arbete tillsammans med ditt team. Ditt team kommer att spela en central roll i att leverera och stödja IT-tjänsterna. Det är av yttersta vikt att genomföra och dokumentera arbetet enligt etablerade rutiner och processer.
 



  





*Just nu letar vi efter:* 



* Infrastrukturtekniker inom Windows med minst 9 års erfarenhet
* Infrastrukturtekniker inom Windows med 4-8 års erfarenhet
* Infrastrukturtekniker inom Windows med 1-3 års erfarenhet
* Infrastrukturtekniker inom Linux med 4-8 års erfarenhet



  





 Tillsammans kommer ni att ansvara för och upprätthålla en IT-infrastruktur med vanliga uppgifter. Det inkluderar att leverera klient- och serverbaserade tjänster och att vara en del av drift- och supportteamet. Ni kommer också att hantera patchning och uppgradering av klient- och servermiljön, samt utveckla skript och använda automatiseringsverktyg för att effektivisera arbetsflöden. Dessutom kommer ni att delta i utvecklingen av tjänster kopplade till infrastrukturplattformen och se till att säkerhetskraven efterlevs. Aktivt deltagande i förbättringsarbeten av tekniska lösningar kommer också att vara en del av ert arbete.
 



  





**Din profil och kvalifikationer** 




*Krav, teambaserat:* 



* Erfarenhet av att hantera Windows-servermiljöer och VDI-plattformar
* Några års erfarenhet av Linux med fokus på serverdrift
* Gedigen erfarenhet av att arbeta med Redhat och CentOS
* Tidigare erfarenhet av att sätta upp nya utvecklingsmiljöer med ovanstående tekniker
* Ett genuint intresse för teknik och att hålla sig uppdaterad med de senaste utvecklingarna inom branschen



*Meriterande:* 



* Scriptningsspråk som Bash, Python eller Perl
* Kunskap inom IT- och informationssäkerhet
* Nätverksskiktet såsom TCP/IP, switching, routing och brandvägg i datacentermiljö
* Övervakningsverktyg som Nagios/op5
* Teknologier som Docker/Podman, Kubernetes, Git, Jenkins, Artifactory, PostgreSQL, Grafana, VMware
* Konfigurationshantering med verktyg som Ansible eller Puppet
* Horizon
* SCCM
* Microsofts standardprodukter såsom Active Directory, DNS, och WDS



  





 Uppdraget omfattas av försvarssekretess vilket sätter kvar på arbete på plats fem dagar i veckan. Säkerhetsprövningssamtal och bakgrundskontroll kommer att genomföras. Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi tycker nämligen att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar. Vi genomför regelbundet spännande aktiviteter där du som konsult får möjlighet att träffa och umgås med dina kollegor under roliga och avslappnande former.

title: Product Specialist - Wireless Technology
description:
Do you enjoy solving complex technical challenges and turning knowledge into value for others? At Atlas Copco, we are strengthening our capability within connected products and wireless technologies. We are now looking for a Product Specialist within wireless and connected products who combines technical curiosity with a strong drive to support, share and continuously improve.
   

  

 This is a role where your expertise will directly impact customers, global collaboration, and how we scale knowledge across our organisation.
   

  

 Your role
   

  

 As a Product Specialist, you act as a global technical expert supporting our Customer Centers. Your focus is to resolve product and application issues efficiently while ensuring that knowledge is captured and shared for long-term impact. Your work will directly contribute to customer uptime and how we improve and scale our products globally.
   

  

 The role includes collaboration with customers across different markets, and openness to global travel is important, as it involves customer visits worldwide (approximately 20 days per year).
   

  

**You Will**
* Troubleshoot product and connectivity-related issues, from initial analysis to solution, particularly within wireless-enabled and connected solutions
* Support Customer Centers globally and collaborate with functions such as R&D, Service and Product Management
* Translate technical findings into clear, actionable insights
* Capture and structure knowledge so that solutions can be reused across the organisation
* Contribute to continuous improvement by identifying patterns and root causes


 In this role, you combine hands-on problem solving with contributing to how we build long-term capability.
   

  

 To succeed, you will need
   

  

 We are looking for someone with strong technical potential and the right mindset.
   

  

**You Bring**
* Interest and ability to troubleshoot technical issues and a willingness to take on increasingly complex challenges over time
* Communication skills, with the ability to explain technical topics clearly to different audiences
* A structured way of working, with the ability to manage multiple priorities
* A collaborative mindset and comfort working across teams and geographies
* A strong sense of ownership and accountability, combined with curiosity and a drive to understand root causes
* Learning agility - you quickly build new knowledge and apply it in practice


**It Is Beneficial If You Also Have**
* Exposure to connected products, IoT or technical support environments
* Understanding of networking concepts, such as wireless communication
* Experience working in global or cross-functional environments


 The above can be developed on the job for the right candidate - so even if you don't check all boxes we encourage you to apply.
   

  

 In return, we offer
   

  

 At Atlas Copco, you will be part of a culture built on trust, responsibility and continuous learning. You will be part of a team where knowledge sharing and continuous improvement are part of everyday work. We offer a role where you can grow from technical problem-solver to a key contributor in how we scale knowledge globally.
   

  

**You Will Have The Opportunity To**
* Develop deep technical expertise in a global context
* Work closely with colleagues across functions and geographies
* Influence how we improve products, support and ways of working
* Grow into future roles within technical leadership, R&D or product management


 Job location
   

  

 This role offers a hybrid working arrangement, most of your time will be spent at our office in Nacka, Sweden, with the flexibility to work from home.
   

  

 Contact information
   

  

 Selection and interviews will take place continuously, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. The process includes interviews and an assessment, followed by reference checks and a background check for the final candidate.
   

  

 If you have any questions, you’re welcome to contact Talent Acquisition Specialist, Hanna Andersson (hanna.andersson@atlascopco.com)
   

  

**Uniting curious minds**
 Behind every innovative solution, there are people working together to transform the future. With careers sparked by initiative and lifelong learning, we unite curious minds, and you could be one of them.

title: Director Strategic Sourcing, Getinge Critical Care
description:
**With a passion for life**
 Join our diverse teams of passionate people and a career that allows you to develop both personally and professionally. At Getinge we exist to make life-saving technology accessible for more people. To make a true difference for our customers – and to save more lives, we need team players, forward thinkers, and game changers.
   

  

 Are you looking for an inspiring career? You just found it.
   

  

**About This Opportunity**
 Product Area Critical Care at Getinge is a key business area with annual revenues of approximately SEK 5.0 billion (2025). The product area includes the segments Advanced Patient Monitoring, Ventilation and Anesthesia, with development and production sites in
 **Solna, Sweden** 
 , and
 **Munich, Germany** 
 , and sales and service organizations as part of Getinge’s global sales structure.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Director, Strategic Purchasing to further strengthen our strategic purchasing capability within Critical Care. You will be part of the Sourcing Management Team and play a central role in shaping the long‑term competitiveness, productivity, and resilience of our supply chain.
   

  

 In this role, your primary responsibility will be to lead strategic sourcing initiatives and supplier development activities for selected direct material categories, ensuring alignment with business objectives, regulatory requirements, and sustainability goals.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 As Director, Strategic Purchasing, you will work in close collaboration with Engineering, Quality, Planning, Regulatory, Operations, our global purchasing network and suppliers. Your key responsibilities include:
   

  

* Lead and develop the sourcing team for selected categories, supplier projects, and lead buyers
* Define and drive strategic category directions based on market conditions, supply risk, and business needs
* Develop and optimize the supplier base to improve cost, quality, delivery, and performance
* Build and sustain a productivity pipeline using best‑practice sourcing methods and lean initiatives in collaboration with suppliers
* Drive early supplier involvement and innovation in product development phases


 This position is based in Solna, Sweden. Due to the nature of the role, it is mainly site‑based, with occasional international travel. You will report to Senior Director Purchasing at Critical Care.
   

  

**You will bring**
 To be successful in this position, we believe that you have the following qualifications:
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Technology, or Business Administration
* 10–15 years of experience in strategic sourcing within manufacturing, preferably Medtech
* Proven leadership experience with the ability to coach, develop, and engage teams
* Strong negotiation skills and experience in cost analysis and value engineering
* Solid understanding of end‑to‑end supply chains, lean principles, and KPI‑driven sourcing
* Experience conducting supply risk assessments and managing complex sourcing structures
* Knowledge of SAP and MS Office
* Experience with ESG and sustainability topics within sourcing is a strong advantage
* Fluency in English, written and spoken (Swedish is beneficial)


 In addition to your technical skills, we highly value your personality. You are:
   

  

* A collaborative, prestige‑less team player with a hands‑on approach
* Strategic and analytical, yet pragmatic and solution‑oriented
* A strong communicator with cultural awareness and the ability to work across functions and geographies
* Down‑to‑earth, humble, and enthusiastic, with a genuine interest in people
* A present leader with an agile mindset and the ability to manage multiple priorities


 We believe you have a strong ambition for continuous improvement and a curiosity to stay updated within your field. At Getinge, we value proactive, self‑driven individuals who contribute to both business results and team development.
   

  

**Why join Getinge**
 Getinge offers a role in a safe, collaborative, and informal work environment with close cooperation between teams and leaders. We believe in developing our people and will support your continued learning and professional growth.
   

  

 We offer a competitive compensation and benefits package, including wellness allowance, generous family benefits, and company‑wide activities — all designed to support your well‑being and long‑term goals.
   

  

**Application**
 Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, and we therefore recommend that you submit your application as soon as possible, but no later than
   

  

 Please submit your application via our recruitment system by clicking Apply now. Due to GDPR regulations, we do not accept applications via email.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application and hope you will join us on our journey to become the world’s most desired MedTech company.
   

  

**About Us**
 With a firm belief that every person and community should have access to the best possible care, Getinge provides hospitals and life science institutions with products and solutions aiming to improve clinical results and optimize workflows. The offering includes products and solutions for intensive care, cardiovascular procedures, operating rooms, sterile reprocessing and life science. Getinge employs over 12,000 people worldwide and the products are sold in more than 135 countries.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process.

title: Service Operation Excellence & Agile Transformation Leader
description:
Are you ready to lead the transformation of service operations into the future? We are looking for a strategic and results-driven leader to drive the evolution toward a customer-centric, data-driven, AI-enabled, and automation-first organization.  

Your mission  

As a Service Operation Excellence & Agile Transformation Leader, you will play a key role in transforming service operations into a modern, proactive, and intelligent organization.  

You will:  

  

Lead the transformation toward a customer-centric, data-driven, AI-enabled, and automation-first operating model  

Shift from reactive service management to future ways of working based on four transformation pillars:  

  

Predictive – anticipate incidents, risks, demand, and service degradation before impacting customers  

Preventive – eliminate recurring issues through root cause removal, knowledge reuse, and automation  

Prescriptive – leverage data and AI to guide optimal operational decisions  

Autonomous – enable self-healing, auto-remediation, and intelligent service operations  

  

Increase speed, resilience, service quality, and customer experience without increasing operational risk

**Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter**


What you will do  

You will drive operational excellence and lead transformation initiatives across the organization:  

  

Drive excellence across ITIL processes, including incident, problem, change, and knowledge management  

Enhance customer experience through improved service reliability, transparency, communication, and proactive service assurance  

Lead the adoption of AI-powered service management, AIOps, automation-by-default, observability, and self-healing capabilities  

Establish standardized, scalable, and measurable ways of working across service operations  

Lead agile transformation by enabling cross-functional, empowered, and outcome-driven teams  

Build and manage a KPI-driven performance framework focused on:  

  

Customer satisfaction and service experience  

Operational cost optimization  

MTTR/MTTD reduction  

Change success rate and auto-remediation rate  

Ticket reduction and productivity improvement  

SLO/SLA adherence  

Compliance  

  

Continuously improve service delivery, SLA fulfillment, and operational efficiency across services and business streams

**Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll**


Who you are  

We are looking for an experienced leader who can turn strategy into measurable results:  

  

A senior IT service operations leader with a strong customer focus  

Proven track record of leading transformation in complex IT service, infrastructure, platform, or managed services environments  

Comfortable working with customers, service delivery leaders, technical teams, and executive stakeholders  

A strong change leader with a focus on outcomes, simplification, and business impact  

Passionate about building future-ready service operations using AI, automation, and data-driven insights  

  

Required skills and experience  

  

Extensive experience in ITIL-based service management (incident, problem, change, knowledge)  

Strong background in Operational Excellence, Lean, and continuous improvement  

Solid understanding of customer experience within IT services, including SLA/SLO management  

Experience working with Agile, DevOps, SRE, and product-oriented operating models  

Hands-on experience with AIOps, automation, observability, and AI-driven operations  

Proven ability to define and manage KPIs, SLAs/SLOs, dashboards, and service improvement plans  

Strong stakeholder management skills across all organizational levels  

Experience driving cost optimization, productivity improvements, compliance, and risk reduction  

Excellent communication, coaching, and transformation leadership skills  

  

Why join us?  

  

Lead a high-impact transformation program  

Work at the forefront of AI-driven service operations  

Influence both business outcomes and customer experience  

Be part of building a modern, future-ready organization.  

  

If you have any questions feel free to contact the hiring leader Karin Magnusson, karin.magnusson@cgi.com

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**  

  

Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.  

  

Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.  

  

Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.  

  

Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
  

  

Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.
company_description: Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Projektplanerare
description:
Är du en kommunikativ och strukturerad person som lockas av att planera internationella projekt inom försvarsindustrin? Sök rollen som projektplanerare hos BAE Systems Hägglunds AB och ta chansen att jobba i ett globalt företag där du har stora möjligheter till kompetens- och karriärutveckling.

 **Din framtida utmaning**


Vi söker en projektplanerare till vår projektplaneringsavdelning. Projektplanering är en förutsättning för att vi som företag skall kunna hantera och leverera komplexa projekt. Planeringen ska leda till en enhetlig syn på vad som krävs för att komma i mål på alla nivåer i ett projekt.


Du ingår ett projektteam, där du är projektledarens stöd. Du driver projektets planeringsarbete och metodik.


Du arbetar med milestones och tidplaner, framtagande och analys av projektstrukturer, uppföljning, kravställning, schedule risker, och rapportering av projektet i nära samarbete med projektledningen inklusive projektcontrollers.

 **Den du är**


Vi söker dig som har:

* Universitets/högskoleutbildning inom ingenjörsområdet eller ekonomi, eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av planering
* Erfarenhet att arbeta i Office paketet
* God förmåga av att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift både på svenska och engelska.


Meriterande är erfarenhet av arbete i industriprojekt samt arbete i system, t.ex. Primavera, MS Project, Devops


För att trivas i rollen är du en självgående person med driv och engagemang, som strukturerar och planerar ditt arbete på ett effektivt sätt. Du har ett strategiskt helhetsperspektiv och hanterar komplexitet med trygghet, samtidigt som du använder relevanta modeller i ditt arbete. Eftersom du arbetar i projektteam trivs du i samarbete med andra, tar egna initiativ och bidrar aktivt till gemensamma mål. Du är en god kommunikatör och känner dig bekväm i en föränderlig miljö där utveckling är en naturlig del av vardagen.

 **Vad du blir en del av**


Hos oss får du jobba i ett globalt företag där du har stora möjligheter till kompetens- och karriärutveckling. Vi erbjuder många personalförmåner; bland annat arbetstidsförkortning, friskvårdsbidrag, förmånlig föräldralön mm.

  

Om du inte kan se filmen, klicka på länken: https://youtu.be/sbvv-Jm2PhI


BAE Systems levererar några av världens mest avancerade, teknikledande lösningar inom försvar, flyg och säkerhet. Vi har 82 500 kvalificerade medarbetare i mer än 40 länder. Genom att vi arbetar tillsammans med kunder och lokala partners, levererar vi produkter och tjänster med militär kapacitet, som skyddar människor och den nationella säkerheten samt säkrar viktig information och infrastruktur.


BAE Systems Hägglunds fokuserar på utveckling, tillverkning, integration och support av ett brett spektrum av militära fordon till kunder över hela världen. Våra främsta produkter är medeltunga stridsfordon (CV90), bepansrade terrängfordon (BvS10), stöd och support samt elhybrida drivsystem för den civila marknaden. Pålitlig, Innovativ och Djärv är ledorden för vår verksamhet.


Läs gärna mer om Örnsköldsvik och Höga Kusten på www.jobbaochlev.se/ - www.inspiration.ornskoldsvik.se - www.hogakusten.com/sv

 **Kontaktperson**


Har du frågor kring tjänsten, kontakta: Tobias Jansson, rekryterande chef 070-253 73 06 eller rekryteringskonsult Lisa Fagerström 076-824 17 89.


Sista ansökningsdagen är den 21 juni. Vi vill gärna ha din ansökan så snart som möjligt då vi jobbar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas före ansökningstidens utgång.


Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med placeringsort Örnsköldsvik.


Vi arbetar med försvarssekretess, vilket innebär både legala krav samt speciella krav från våra kunder på oss som företag. Alla som anställs ska därför genomgå säkerhetskontroll och drogtest.

  

Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

company_description: BAE Systems, Inc. is the U.S. subsidiary of BAE Systems plc, an international defense, aerospace and security company. Meaningful. Empowering. Remarkable. That’s a career at BAE Systems.

title: Senior AI Cloud Architect Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)
description:
Stockholm, Sweden


* Full-time
* Application and Product Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Indtech

  
Job Description **Senior AI Cloud Architect (AI Platform)- Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)**

*Tietoevry Public 360 - building secure, scalable digital services for the public sector across the Nordics.*

**About the role**


Public 360 integrates cloud-based AI capabilities into standard enterprise software. We are building solutions for 600+ public organizations in the Nordics, and our AI platform runs customer deployments at scale and is evolving fast with GenAI and agentic AI.


As Senior AI Cloud Architect, you own the cloud architecture for our AI platform and shared services. You will define reference architectures, make key technology choices (Microsoft-first, but open), and ensure security, reliability, and automation as we scale.

**What you will do**

* Design and evolve the target architecture for a public-cloud-first AI platform (Azure preferred).
* Exploration of alternative deployment strategies for high-security customers
* Build secure, compliant foundations: landing zones, identity, networking, encryption, secrets, logging, and policy-as-code.
* Architect for scale and automation: infrastructure as code, CI/CD, GitOps, self-service environments, and operational runbooks.
* Own platform reliability: observability, SLOs, incident patterns, performance, and cost optimization (FinOps).
* Define patterns for AI product integration: APIs, event-driven processing, data pipelines, and multi-tenant considerations.
* Partner with AI engineers/data scientists on MLOps and LLMOps: model delivery pipelines, feature stores, evaluation, and monitoring.
* Drive security and Trustworthy AI practices together with security, privacy, and product teams (GDPR and data residency aware).
* Support solutioning and pre-sales when needed, and mentor architects/engineers across product teams.

**What you bring**

* Senior – 8-10+ years of relevant experience, including service or solution architecture in complex product environments.  

More junior profiles will be considered in case of relevant experience – not the time but the type of experience and responsibility is important to us.
* Strong public cloud architecture skills (Azure: AKS/Container Apps, Functions, App Service, API Management, Event Hubs/Service Bus, Storage, SQL/Cosmos DB, Key Vault, Entra ID).
* Experience with multiple deployment scenarios and high security requirements is a plus
* Hands-on experience with automation: Terraform and/or Bicep, CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), and modern deployment practices.
* Proven security architecture skills: threat modeling, zero trust, network segmentation, secrets management, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
* Experience building or operating AI/ML platforms: Azure ML/MLflow, model serving, data pipelines, and LLM integration patterns.
* Ability to translate business needs into pragmatic architectures and communicate clearly with both engineers and stakeholders.

**Nice to have**

* Experience with GenAI platforms (e.g., Azure OpenAI) and guardrails: content filters, prompt injection defense, red teaming, and evaluation.
* Knowledge of data engineering components: Databricks/Spark, Delta Lake, data streaming, and search/vector databases.
* Certifications such as Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure Security Engineer, or similar.

**Impact you will have**

* Own the reference architecture for our cloud-first AI platform supporting AI capabilities for public organizations in the Nordics.
* Raise the security and compliance baseline with zero-trust patterns, policy-as-code, and audit-ready controls.
* Increase delivery speed and consistency through automation: self-service environments.
* Improve reliability and cost efficiency with SLO-driven operations, observability, and FinOps practices.

**Tech we use**


Azure-first and automation-driven: containers/Kubernetes, serverless, messaging, IaC (Terraform/Bicep), CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), observability, and cloud security tooling. We are open to AWS/GCP experience.

**What success looks like in 6 months**

* A clear platform roadmap indicating the next steps for our data and ai platform as baseline for our product teams, supporting our vision of AI-first and agentic-first software offerings in the public sector domain.
* Review and implementation of defined improvements of automation framework and pipelines in place for core platform services.
* Operational excellence established: dashboards, SLOs, alerting, and incident playbooks used in day-to-day operations.
* Security and Trustworthy AI governance embedded: threat models, risk assessments, and guardrail patterns for GenAI use cases.

**Why join us**

* Build technology that improves citizen services - with real-world scale and meaningful impact.
* A highly skilled, collaborative environment with room to influence architecture decisions end-to-end.
* Modern cloud-first stack, strong focus on security and responsible AI, and freedom to explore new approaches (including agentic AI).
* Professional growth, international collaboration, and a culture built on trust, transparency, and ownership.

**Practicalities**


Location and work setup: flexible/hybrid, ideally near one of our development hubs in Scandinavia (Oslo, Stockholm, Copenhagen or Espoo). Fluent English required; Nordic language skills are a plus.

 **Are you our new colleague?**  

  

We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Geir Are Bjørnsrud (geirare.bjornsrud@tietoevry.com)

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.

title: Projektledare till Tyréns projektkontor
description:
**Ort:** Stockholm


**Sista ningsdatum:** 28 juni, 2026


Tyréns är ett av Sveriges ledande konsultföretag inom samhällsbyggnad. Vi är specialister inom stadsutveckling, arkitektur och infrastruktur som bygger samhällen som håller.


**Om tjänsten**



Som *Projektledare* hos oss på Tyréns kommer du arbeta inom Business Support & Business Development som består av totalt 15 personer, specialiserade inom områdena anbud & sälj, hållbarhet & kvalitet, säkerhet samt strategi & projektkontor. Vi arbetar alla både strategiskt och operativt, med förvaltning och utveckling samt stöd och rådgivning med syftet att bidra till att förverkliga Tyréns affär: *Jobba med samhällsbyggnad med målet att skapa bättre förutsättningar för dagens och framtidens städer.*



I denna roll kommer du exempelvis jobba med att:


* Leda IT‑ och digitaliseringsprojekt genom hela livscykeln: förstudie, krav, design, införande och överlämning
* Planera, driva och facilitera workshops för: processkartläggning, kravanalys och förbättringsarbete
* Säkerställa kvalitet i krav, test, release och förändringsledning
* Samverka med verksamhet, IT, leverantörer och andra intressenter
* Arbeta strukturerat i både agila arbetssätt och mer traditionella projektformer


Som projektledare på Tyréns Business support and Business Development leder du större och medelstora digitala initiativ – från tidig analys till införande och överlämning till förvaltning. Uppdragen omfattar bland annat verksamhetskritiska system, digitala samarbetsplattformar och förändringsprojekt där både arbetssätt och stödverktyg utvecklas för verksamheten.


Du arbetar nära verksamheten och är en nyckelperson i att omsätta behov till hållbara lösningar.


**Vi erbjuder**



Som anställd på Tyréns erbjuder vi dig bland annat:


* Fantastiska kollegor och många specialister inom våra olika kompetensområden
* En värderingsdriven kultur där *Connect*, *Create* & *Challenge* är våra ledord
* En stimulerande arbetsmiljö i våra lokaler med möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån del av din arbetstid
* Möjlighet att jobba med innovationsprojekt
* Kompetensutveckling anpassad efter dig
* Sociala aktiviteter, både på och efter ordinarie arbetstid
* Extra lediga dagar utöver dina semesterdagar, vi är t.ex. alltid lediga med lön dagarna mellan jul och nyår
* Flertalet personalförmåner via vår förmånsportal
* Kollektivavtal som vi tecknat med Innovationsföretagen (Almega)

  


**Vi söker**



För att lyckas och trivas i rollen bör du (ha):


* Flerårig erfarenhet av projektledning i komplexa organisationer
* Stark kompetens inom: kravanalys, kravdokumentation, processkartläggning och workshopledning
* Erfarenhet av att leda införande av verksamhetskritiska system
* God förståelse för hela kedjan från krav till test, release och förvaltning
* Vana att arbeta i eller nära agila team (t.ex. Scrum, DevOps)
* Teknisk och verksamhetsmässig förståelse
* God förståelse för Microsoft 365‑plattformen, inklusive Teams och SharePoint
* Erfarenhet av eller god kännedom om verksamhetsnära system och integrationer
* Förmåga att agera trygg beställare och dialogpartner mot leverantörer och arkitekter


Meriterande är erfarenhet/kunskap inom:


* Erfarenhet av ERP‑implementering
* Tidigare arbete i konsult- eller uppdragsform
* Kunskap inom tjänstedesign eller verksamhetsmodellering
* Certifiering eller formell utbildning inom agil metodik eller projektledning


Personliga egenskaper vi tror passar rollen och vår företagskultur:


* Analytisk, strukturerad och strategiskt lagd
* Kommunikativ och pedagogisk med förmåga att skapa engagemang
* Lösningsorienterad och modig – du vågar tänka nytt
* Prestigelös och trygg i att växla mellan strategiskt och operativt arbete
* Kvalitetsmedveten och leveranssäker

För denna tjänst ser vi att du hanterar det svenska och engelska språket i både tal och skrift för att kunna tillmötesgå våra kunder och kollegors behov.


**a**



Du är varmt välkommen med din an! Personligt brev är inte ett krav hos oss, men kommer naturligtvis läsas om det bifogas.


Vi rekryterar löpande, så skicka gärna din an redan idag då tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ningsdag.



Med hänvisning till GDPR tar vi inte emot ningar per mejl utan hanterar enbart ningar som kommer in via ningslänken.


**Kontakt**



Vill du veta mer om tjänsten eller har frågor? Då är du välkommen att kontakta:



Helena Wetterwik  

Head of Business Support & Business Development
helena.wetterwik@tyrens.se
070-762 41 55  


Tyréns är ett av Sveriges ledande konsultföretag inom samhällsbyggnad. I samspel med kunder och partners skapar vi hållbara lösningar inom stadsutveckling och infrastruktur. Tyrénskoncernen har 3 000 medarbetare med verksamhet i Sverige, Storbritannien, Estland, Litauen, Polen, Bulgarien och Kanada. Tyréns är stiftelseägt och vår ägandeform gör det möjligt för oss att satsa målmedvetet på forskning och innovation inom samhällsbyggnadsområdet. Vi drivs av nyfikenhet och har ett nära samarbete med universitet och högskolor.  



**Sista ningsdatum:** 28 juni, 2026

title: Senior Fullstack Test Engineer - Göteborg
description:
Vill du ta en senior testroll där du kombinerar teknisk testning, testautomation och kvalitetssäkring genom hela utvecklingslivscykeln? Vi söker nu en Senior Fullstack Test Engineer till ett uppdrag där du får bidra till att vidareutveckla testarbete, automatisering och kvalitet i digitala tjänster.
  
I rollen arbetar du nära utvecklare, business analysts, testare och andra intressenter för att säkerställa hög kvalitet, stabila leveranser och effektiva testprocesser. Du kommer både att vidareutveckla befintliga automatiserade tester och identifiera nya områden där testautomation kan skapa värde.
  
Om rollen
  
Som Senior Fullstack Test Engineer kommer du att ha en bred och teknisk testroll med fokus på UI-, API- och backendtestning. Du arbetar med att analysera krav, bryta ner dem till testfall, säkerställa acceptanskriterier och driva kvalitet i utvecklingsarbetet.
  
Du kommer även att arbeta med felsökning och analys, exempelvis genom loggar, integrationer och browser DevTools, samt bidra till förbättrad monitorering av befintliga tjänster. Rollen passar dig som har ett testledande mindset och trivs med att både arbeta operativt och driva förbättringar.
  
Exempel på arbetsuppgifter
  
Analysera krav och ta fram testfall för nyutveckling
  
  

Säkerställa valideringskrav och acceptanskriterier tillsammans med BA och utvecklare
  
  

Utveckla, underhålla och förbättra automatiserade testsviter
  
  

Identifiera nya områden för testautomation
  
  

Automatisera tester inom UI, API och backend
  
  

Genomföra manuell och explorativ testning vid behov
  
  

Köra automatiserade testsviter och analysera resultat
  
  

Rapportera, analysera och följa upp defekter i icke-produktionsmiljöer
  
  

Undersöka fel i systemtester, drift och incidenter
  
  

Arbeta med testdata i flera miljöer
  
  

Bidra till CI/CD och förbättrade deploy- och releaseprocesser
  
  

Stötta och kompetensutveckla andra testare inom automation, API och backend
  
  

Vi söker dig som har
  
Minst 5 års erfarenhet som testare och/eller testledare
  
  

Stark teknisk bakgrund inom testautomation
  
  

Erfarenhet av att automatisera testfall för UI, API och backend
  
  

Erfarenhet av API-testning med exempelvis Postman eller Insomnia
  
  

Kunskap om mikrotjänster och olika API-typer såsom REST, GraphQL och WebSocket
  
  

Erfarenhet av testautomationsverktyg såsom Cypress, Selenium, Robot Framework eller liknande
  
  

God förståelse för Software Test Life Cycle
  
  

Erfarenhet av test management-verktyg
  
  

Erfarenhet av digitala tjänster
  
  

Mycket goda kunskaper i engelska
  
  

Det är meriterande om du har
  
Erfarenhet av DevOps och CI/CD-pipelines
  
  

God förståelse för agila principer
  
  

Grundläggande kunskaper inom HTML, CSS och JavaScript
  
  

Erfarenhet av Cypress och/eller Robot Framework
  
  

Erfarenhet av test och automation kopplat till kartbaserade verktyg
  
  

Erfarenhet av AI-verktyg såsom Copilot, AWS Kiro eller liknande
  
  

Svenska språkkunskaper
  
  

Som person
  
Vi tror att du är analytisk, strukturerad och kommunikativ. Du har ett starkt kvalitetsfokus och trivs med att samarbeta nära utvecklingsteam och andra intressenter. Du är självgående, nyfiken på nya tekniker och har ett driv att förbättra både testautomatisering, arbetssätt och produktkvalitet.
  
Vi erbjuder
  
32 dagars semester
  
  

Full tjänstepension
  
  

Friskvårdsbidrag
  
  

Kompetensutveckling
  
  

Stöttande team

title: Site Reliability Engineer – Data & Analytics Infrastructure | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.***About the role:**
You will be part of our Data Platform Foundation team with the mission to provide a future-proof, reliable and efficient data platform for SEB. Together with your colleagues you will be responsible for data storage, batch processing and operations, workflow automation and orchestration, monitoring, hybrid cloud integration with GCP and much more. Everything with security and automation in mind. You will have the opportunity to broaden your competence and will be given generous amount of time for your own ideas and projects. We belong to the SEB Data Analytics Infra and Connectivity tribe, an international environment with multiple agile development teams located in Stockholm (Solna) and Vilnius, consisting of experts in various Big Data technologies.

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Experience working in Linux environments.


* Programming and scripting skills (e.g. Bash; Python).


* Comfortable with Terraform, Ansible


* A DevOps, SRE mindset.


* Collaboration skills and a high sense of responsibility.
* The ability and willingness to share knowledge.



**Bonus points for:**
* Experience with version control systems (e.g. Git)


* Experience working with container orchestration (e.g. Docker; Kubernetes; OpenShift)


* Experience with the Apache stack (e.g Nifi, Airflow, Spark)


* Knowledge of authentication and authorization services (e.g. Kerberos; LDAP; OAuth 2.0)


* Experience with cloud technologies, preferably GCP (e.g DataProc, Composer, BigQuery)



**What we offer:**
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits.
* International opportunities and working environment.
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week


* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Innovative company in forefront of technology.
* Agile and modern ways of working.


* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views



**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
Welcome to our inclusive culture, where our shared values inspire and uplift our team. We celebrate diversity and strive to ensure every employee feels seen, heard, and valued. We are looking forward to your application by **June 30th, 2026.** Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application before the deadline. If you have questions about the position, please contact Nikola Rajkovic, Team Manager by nikola.rajkovic@seb.se

**Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.**
**https://sebgroup.com/career**
**https://bit.ly/SEBcareer**  



SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which is why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Konsultuppdrag | Senior Platform Engineer / DevOps / Infrastructure Consultant
description:
Start: Omgående och ca 6 månader, med ev. förlängning.


Hybrid, ca 3 dagar på kontoret i veckan


**Assignment Overview**


We are looking for a senior consultant with strong experience in platform engineering, Kubernetes operations, Linux environments, and backend automation development. The consultant will work in a Software Operations organization focused on building scalable tooling, infrastructure automation, and operational platforms supporting large-scale global systems. The role combines software engineering, DevOps, infrastructure engineering, and operational platform ownership.


A significant part of the assignment involves operating and developing large-scale Kubernetes environments running primarily on self-managed and on-prem infrastructure.

**Required Competence**

Must Have


* Strong experience operating and maintaining large-scale Kubernetes platforms in selfmanaged or on-prem environments
* Several years of hands-on Linux experience in both development and operational environments
* Strong Python development skills with experience building automation, backend services, tooling, and APIs
* Experience with GitOps methodologies and tools such as Argo CD
* Experience with AWS and hybrid cloud environments
* Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines in Linux environments
* Strong understanding of infrastructure automation, container platforms, and distributed systems
* Experience with Docker and containerized workloads
* Experience designing scalable operational tooling and automation workflows
* Experience with backend frameworks such as Flask, FastAPI, or Django
* Ability to work across both development and operational/infrastructure domains
* Experience with automated testing and test strategies
* Strong communication and collaboration skills
* Structured and methodical way of working
* Ability to contribute to technical discussions, architecture, and long-term platform scalability

 **Nice to Have**

* Experience with blue/green deployment strategies
* Experience from large-scale operational or platform environments
* Experience mentoring or coaching engineers
* Scrum Master or agile coordination experience
* Experience with provisioning physical infrastructure and network-connected environments

**Technical Environment**

* Kubernetes (large-scale, self-managed/on-prem)
* Linux
* Python
* Argo CD / GitOps
* AWS
* Docker
* GitLab CI/CD
* Flask / FastAPI / Django
* PostgreSQL
* Bash scripting
* Hybrid cloud and infrastructure environments


Personal Attributes

* Hands-on and technically driven
* Comfortable working close to infrastructure and operations
* Collaborative and communicative
* Structured and proactive
* Interested in both software engineering and platform architecture
* Able to work independently in cross-functional environments

**Om oss**

*Senterprise är ett ledande rekryteringsbolag inom IT och en oberoende förmedlare av frilansande konsulter. Med aktiv headhunting, search och djup teknisk förståelse hjälper vi några av Sveriges främsta arbetsgivare att hitta rätt kandidater, både för anställning och konsultuppdrag.*

*Läs vidare på* *www.senterprise.se*

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Azure DevOps Engineer Opportunity in Stockholm - AI Software Company** 




  





 I am hiring for an English speaking Azure DevOps Engineer to join a brilliant software company partnered with Microsoft working in the live streaming industry.
 



  





 With the help of their Microsoft partnership as well as a few other major tech enterprises, they have seen phenomenal success and are looking to expand their Infra team.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




  




* Design, build, and maintain Kubernetes clusters in Azure, and assist with a migration from AKS to self-managed Kubernetes clusters.
* Develop and maintain infrastructure using Terraform.
* Design and manage GitHub workflows and CI/CD pipelines.
* Contribute to platform reliability, scalability, and security in a cloud-hosted production environment.



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 3+ years' experience working as a DevOps engineer with strong hands-on experience working with Kubernetes, standalone and AKS (any knowledge of Service Mesh, Istio, CAPI, or CAPZ is a massive bonus!)
* Strong Terraform experience
* Experienced working with different Azure services, e.g. Storage Accounts, VNETS, Virtual Machines, Keyvaults, Network Security Groups.



  





*This role is available for English speakers, however you must already have a visa or permanent residency, and be living in Stockholm.* 




  





**Why Join?** 




  




* Work for a Microsoft partner at the forefront of modern video production technology.
* Play an important role in a major Kubernetes infrastructure transformation.
* High technical ownership and architectural influence.
* Flexible hybrid set up with modern office.
* Competitive salary and benefits package.



  





 Please apply via the Easy Apply function.
 



  





 For more information, please email l.letchford@tenthrevolution.com.
 



  





 The application deadline for this position is the 19th of June 2026. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so early applications are encouraged.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team. In this role, you will build and evolve our cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and platform tooling, ensuring our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure as we grow.
   

  

 This is a hands-on builder role for someone who enjoys automation, ownership, and turning complexity into clean, scalable infrastructure.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, build, and maintain cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Implement and maintain monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions.
* Collaborate with developers to improve deployment workflows and platform reliability.
* Work with serverless technologies (Lambda) for event processing and automation.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to infrastructure projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document infrastructure architecture, processes, and runbooks.


 Success means engineers ship confidently, systems scale without drama, and incidents are rare, visible, and quickly resolved.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in DevOps, platform engineering, or backend development.
* Strong skills in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Experience with AWS services, particularly ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Experience with CI/CD tools and pipeline automation.
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with message queuing (SQS, SNS).
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Strong skills in monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Scripting skills in Python, Bash, or Go.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Enthusiasm for using AI agents and tools in daily development work.
* Experience in FinTech is a plus.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1/Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology
