title: Data Analyst
description:
**Professional Galaxy** is an IT and technology consulting company that provides highly specialized expertise within IT, software development, SAP, purchasing, electronics and mechanical design. We collaborate with experienced senior experts and deliver strategic value-creating expertise to some of Sweden's most complex and analytically demanding projects. Our focus is always on high quality, professionalism and clear, measurable results.


We are now seeking a **Data Analyst** for one of our clients.

**About the assignment:**


We are looking for a senior Data Scientist consultant to develop analytical models and decision-support tools for electric vehicle asset management, pricing, residual value, lifecycle planning, and portfolio risk.  

  

The assignment combines data science, business understanding, and practical engineering. The consultant should be able to take ownership of broad and sometimes ambiguous problems, turn analysis into usable tools or model services, and communicate results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.  

  

Prior experience from electric vehicles, batteries, leasing, or asset management is valuable, but not required. The most important requirements are strong data science capability, practical implementation skills, and senior judgement.  

  

Responsibilities  

Develop and maintain models for usage, remaining useful life, residual value, pricing, lifecycle forecasting, and portfolio risk  

Translate operational vehicle and business data into practical recommendations  

Define, test, and document model assumptions, limitations, and uncertainty  

Build analytical prototypes, simulations, dashboards, APIs, or other decision-support tools  

Work with data engineering to ensure reliable data, data quality checks, and trustworthy outputs  

Productionize models through scheduled jobs, cloud functions, APIs, tests, versioning, and monitoring where relevant  

Support customer, finance, sales, product, and partner discussions with clear data-driven analysis  

Create structure in ambiguous problem areas and help drive work forward in a small team  

Education (Must Have / Nice To Have)  

Must Have:  

  

Bachelor's or Master's degree in data science, computer science, statistics, engineering, economics, or a related field  

Experience (Must Have / Nice To Have)  

Must Have:  

  

Strong Python skills for modelling, data analysis, testing, and production-quality code  

Strong SQL skills and experience working with analytical data platforms  

Experience building models or analytical tools that support real business decisions  

Experience taking ownership from business problem to analysis, model, implementation, and stakeholder adoption  

Cloud experience, such as deploying or operating data products, APIs, scheduled jobs, model services, or similar workloads  

Ability to work with imperfect data and make sound judgements about data quality, assumptions, and business impact  

Practical engineering mindset, with the ability to move from analysis to working tools or services  

Clear communication with both technical and business stakeholders  

Nice To Have:  

  

Experience with electric vehicles, batteries, telematics, battery health, remaining useful life, leasing, residual value, or asset management  

AWS experience  

Experience with CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, automated testing, versioning, or monitoring  

Experience with pricing, forecasting, financial modelling, risk metrics, or portfolio analytics  

Experience building internal tools, dashboards, simulations, model APIs, or decision-support applications  

Language  

English (working language)  

Personal / Soft Skills  

Senior individual contributor with strong self-leadership  

Takes initiative and creates structure in unclear problem areas  

Pragmatic and analytical  

Able to balance model quality, speed, and business usability  

Able to challenge assumptions constructively  

Communicates complex topics clearly  

Comfortable working in a small team with broad responsibilities  

Other Specifications  

The consultant is expected to help turn analysis and models into credible, maintainable, and usable tools or services  

The role requires senior judgement, ownership, and delivery capability more than narrow prior domain knowledge

**Other Information:**  

  

**Start Date:** ASAP

**Assignment Period:** 6 Months

**Location:** Sweden\Stockholms län, \Stockholm (STOCKHOLM)

**Last date to apply:** 2026-06-01


Are you the right person for the assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate? Do not hesitate to contact us.


Please apply directly through our system with:

* Your updated CV in english
* Availability to start the assignment


In the motivation, describe why you are suitable for this assignment - refer to previous consulting assignments, employmxent, education and personal qualities.

**Please note:** We do not accept any applications through mail. All applications have to be sent through the portal to be valid.

**Offer continuously:** Please note that for this role we offer continuously. That means that we sometimes remove the assignments before the deadline. If you are interested, we recommend that you apply immediately.

title: Platform Security Engineer
description:
**About Intric**


Intric is a secure and sovereign AI platform for European enterprises and government organizations. We help organizations build AI agents, automate workflows, and govern their AI adoption, without compromising on privacy or control. We work with 70+ organizations across the public and private sector, and we're growing fast, driven by a fresh round of funding and strong demand from both existing and new customers.

**Role Overview**


Security isn't a feature at Intric. It is the promise we make to Europe's most critical institutions. To keep that promise, we need someone who can both build and secure the infrastructure we run on. You'll work alongside our Infrastructure Engineer and own the security layer across our entire platform, hardening our Kubernetes environments, securing CI/CD pipelines, managing secrets and access controls, and keeping us compliant with ISO 27001 and GDPR.


You won't just flag issues, but you'll fix them, build the systems that prevent them, and set the standard for how we operate. Beyond the technical work, you'll own our compliance program end to end: driving certifications, staying ahead of relevant regulations, and being the person customers and partners turn to when security questions come up.

**Who You Are**


You have 3–6 years in platform engineering, cloud infrastructure, or a security-focused infrastructure role. You've run Kubernetes in production, written IaC, and have a solid grasp of IAM and network security in practice.


You've either owned or been a key contributor to a compliance process and you know what it takes to keep infrastructure auditable and locked down at all times.


You take initiative without being asked, and you've consistently gone beyond the obvious fix to build something that lasts.

**What you will work with**

* Kubernetes and Docker - container orchestration and runtime security
* Linux and Bash - system configuration and automation
* Git and CI/CD pipelines with integrated security scanning
* IAM, secrets management, and network security
* IaC tools such as Terraform or Helm
* Compliance frameworks and security certifications: ISO 27001, GDPR, and others relevant to public sector customers

**Why Join Intric**

* Be part of a visionary team building the future of AI in Europe
* Work in a stimulating, high-growth environment
* Rapid career development with real ownership
* Competitive compensation package combining salary and stock options

**Practical Information**


Location: Stockholm  

Language requirements: fluent English

**Apply**


We review applications continuously and look forward to hearing from you.

title: Senior projektledare Insamling till Sverige för UNHCR
description:
Vill du använda data och smart insamlingskommunikation för att öka intäkter och engagemang för människor på flykt? Vi söker en analytisk och affärsdriven projektledare som vill ansvara för intäkterna från våra befintliga engångsgivare i kanalerna e-post, SMS och postala brev.


I rollen har du ett övergripande ansvar för att planera och optimera datadrivna utskick i rätt kanal, till rätt givare, med rätt CTA och vid rätt tidpunkt. Du ansvarar för segmentering och prioritering tillsammans med CRM-specialist och copywriter, med målet att öka intäkter, antal gåvor och aktiva givare.


Det här är en roll för dig som trivs med att hålla ihop många delar samtidigt och som motiveras av att förbättra resultat genom rätt prioriteringar, datadrivna och insiktsdrivna beslut.


Hos oss får du kombinera analys, strategi och genomförande i en roll där du kan påverka resultatet och samtidigt bidra till en bättre framtid för människor på flykt.

**Du har ett övergripande ansvar för att:**

* Planera och projektleda insamlingsaktiviteter i kanalerna e-post, SMS och postala brev mot befintliga engångsgivare.
* Säkerställa rätt budskap, i rätt kanal, till rätt givare genom segmentering och tydliga prioriteringar.
* Leda arbetet tillsammans med copywriter, CRM-specialist och andra relevanta funktioner.
* Följa upp resultat, driva tester och omsätta insikter och analys till konkreta förbättringar som ökar insamlingen.
* Arbeta nära vår lojalitetsansvariga för att koordinera insatser kopplade till impact, second gift, reaktivering och långsiktigt givarengagemang.

**Vem är du?**


Du är analytisk, strukturerad och trygg i att driva projekt med många delar. Du trivs med att fatta beslut baserat på data och testresultat, ser vad som behöver anpassas för olika målgrupper. Du har lätt för att samarbeta, prioritera och få andra att dra åt samma håll.

**Vi söker dig som har:**

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av insamling, digital marknadsföring, direktmarknadsföring eller liknande projektledande roll.
* Mycket god analytisk förmåga och erfarenhet av att arbeta datadrivet med test, uppföljning och optimering.
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av segmentering och målgruppsstyrd kommunikation baserat på kund- eller givarbeteende.
* God erfarenhet av att planera, koordinera och projektleda utskick i flera kanaler, gärna e-post, SMS och postala brev.
* Förmåga att omsätta analys till tydliga briefar, prioriteringar och beslut tillsammans med interna och externa partners.
* God vana av CRM- och MA-system, gärna Salesforce och Marketing Cloud.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av att arbeta mot intäktsmål, budget och relevanta nyckeltal.
* God samarbetsförmåga och vana att driva arbete framåt tillsammans med olika specialistfunktioner.
* Engagemang för Sverige för UNHCR:s uppdrag.
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift samt mycket goda kunskaper i engelska.
* Erfarenhet från ideell sektor eller medlemsorganisation är meriterande.
* Högskoleexamen inom ekonomi, marknadsföring eller motsvarande.


Du kommer att ingå i vårt insamlingsteam mot privatpersoner i en stimulerande miljö med högkompetenta kollegor med starkt driv i ett internationellt sammanhang. Tjänsten är tillsvidare på heltid och inleds med 6 månaders provanställning. Tjänsten rapporterar formellt till Fundraising Director Individual Giving, men arbetar operativt tillsammans med Team Lead – One off giving och är placerad på kontoret i centrala Stockholm med start omgående.

##### **Ansökan**


Ansök genom Ansök-knappen och svara på ett par frågor. Urval och första intervjuer kommer att hanteras av Hammer & Hanborg. Vi önskar inget personligt brev, endast CV.


Med hänvisning till GDPR kan ansökningar inte tas emot via e-post. Urval sker löpande, så vänta inte med din ansökan. Vi tar emot ansökningar så länge annonsen är publicerad.


Om du har frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att kontakta Emeli Haage, ansvarig rekryteringskonsult, emeli.haage@hammerhanborg.com

**Vi står upp för människor på flykt – gör det du också!**


Varannan sekund tvingas en människa att lämna sitt hem och fly för sitt liv. UNHCR är FN:s flyktingorgan som leder alla de internationella insatserna för att skydda flyktingar. Men i en tid när allt fler människor tvingas på flykt räcker inte resurserna till behoven och därför måste UNHCR kraftigt öka insamlingen från privat sektor. Att arbeta på Sverige för UNHCR är mer än ett jobb – det är ett engagemang för människor på flykt och en chans att varje dag bidra till en större uppgift: att ge skydd, hopp och framtidstro. Här möts driv och professionell spets i en organisation med starkt samhällsengagemang och ett tydligt internationellt perspektiv.


Läs mer här:


https://www.sverigeforunhcr.se/

 *För oss är det skillnad på att bara vara bra och att vara rätt. Kompetens är mycket mer än CV och vi matchar alltid utifrån potential, värderingar och motivation. Vi ser mångfald som en styrka och välkomnar därför alla sökande. Vi tycker det ska vara kul att jobba och tror på samarbeten som bygger på förtroende och schyst agerande. Vi uppmuntrar och utmanar varandra och våra kunder att vilja och våga utvecklas. Tillsammans skapar vi framtidens professionella liv. Välkommen med! Läs mer på* *hammerhanborg.se**.*

 *Hammer & Hanborg by Jurek är medlemmar i Diversity Charter Sweden som verkar för en värld där olika idéer, kunskaper, erfarenheter och kompetenser räknas, där olikhet är en resurs.*

title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
**What will you do?**


As a AI/ML Engineer at Rebtel you will define how AI is done at Rebtel. What tooling we standardise on, how we evaluate models we put in front of real users, what "good" looks like for our prompts and our pipelines. AI is going from a side project to the core of how Rebtel operates and what we ship to our users. We're hiring the second engineer on our ML/AI subteam to help build it classical ML for the business, LLM-powered systems for the product, and a clear production mindset on both.


You'll sit inside the Data team, report to our Head of Data, and partner with one other ML/AI engineer to shape this capability from the ground up.

**Areas of ownership:**  

You'll own work across two complementary tracks, and you'll ship in both.


Classical ML, in production, for operational leverage

* Risk and fraud models across payments, top-ups, and account behaviour
* Churn prediction and retention modelling on a user base of a million-plus
* Forecasting, pricing, segmentation, and the next batch of operational problems we haven't tackled yet
* Owning models end-to-end scoping with stakeholders, building, deploying, monitoring, retraining


LLMs and AI agents, from internal automation to in-product features

* Start with our customer support agents and automations: RAG pipelines, prompt orchestration, tool-use, evaluation harnesses
* Move LLM capability into the product as user-facing features
* Help guide the company on where AI actually creates leverage, what to build, what to buy, what to ignore and turn the good ideas into shipped systems

**Requirements:**

* You are an excellent communicator and collaborator. We work in English, but you will hear many languages in our Stockholm office
* 4+ years of hands-on ML engineering in Python, with real production ownership not just notebooks
* Strong fundamentals in classical ML: feature engineering, model selection, validation, and the unglamorous parts of keeping a model healthy in prod
* A genuine production mindset: monitoring, retraining, eval harnesses, CI/CD for models, and the instinct to debug when something drifts at 2am
* Comfort working the whole loop: stakeholder scoping data model deployment measurement iteration
* Strong written and spoken English, and the ability to translate between business problems and ML ones
* Hands-on experience with LLM frameworks — LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, or equivalents
* Built RAG systems, agentic workflows, or LLM-backed products that real users (or real internal teams) actually used
* Comfortable with vector databases, embeddings, prompt evaluation, and measuring LLM systems with something more rigorous than vibes
* Obsession with staying up-to-date on developments in the AI space
* Experience with a major cloud (AWS / GCP / Azure), containers, and a modern data stack
* Experience in MLOps tooling: MLflow, Airflow, Kubernetes and feature stores is a plus
* Background in fintech, payments, telecom, or other regulated / operational domains is a plus

**Why Rebtel?**


Rebtel has been connecting people across borders for nearly 20 years. Today, we’re profitable, growing, and at a pivotal moment in our journey. As we enter our next phase, we’re building an organisation designed for speed, ownership, and real impact, where every role contributes directly to shaping what comes next.


This is a place with global ambition and a strong foundation, where ideas move quickly and decisions matter. You won’t get lost in layers of process or slow-moving structures. Instead, you’ll find the space to take ownership, collaborate across teams, and make meaningful contributions from day one. Based in Stockholm, we bring together a diverse, international team united by a shared purpose: to simplify the way people connect worldwide.


At Rebtel, you are the most important asset and we strive to provide a comprehensive package of benefits and perks that enhance your well-being and work experience. Here are some of the things you can expect from us:

* Pension Plan
* Health Checkups, Influenza shots and Private Medical Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Occupational insurance
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK)
* Discount on gym memberships
* Bonus program
* Extra parental pay
* 30 days annual vacation
* Monday breakfasts
* Relocation Support, if you're joining us from afar, we'll assist you in making a smooth transition.

*We are Rebtel. We come from all around the world to create products for anyone who has crossed a border. We believe in equal opportunity and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*
company_description: Our team mirrors our global audience: we are a diverse team of people from over 30 different countries that get together everyday.

title: Data Platform Engineer
description:
Bannerflow is a fast-growing global SaaS company building a Creative Intelligence Platform that enables enterprise brands to predict, create, and optimize advertising across channels.


We’re on a company-wide AI transformation journey, where AI and agentic workflows are becoming a core part of how we build and innovate, with high expectations on adoption across all teams.


Our teams are highly autonomous, collaborative, and we are now looking for another passionate engineer to join us!

### **The challenge: Scaling data for the future**


Our platform serves 500+ million impressions daily, with peaks over 1 billion impressions, and we’re just getting started. We’re currently rebuilding our entire data infrastructure from the ground up to adopt a data lakehouse approach, enabling:

* Scalability & Flexibility:  

Handling billions of data points while staying cost-efficient and future-proof.
* Data-Driven Features (AI & ML):  

Enabling predictive models and automation based on historical data.
* Business Intelligence & Analytics:  

Delivering insights directly to customers in our platform.


To make this vision a reality, we’re looking for an experienced Data Platform Engineer to join our Platform team, and take full ownership of designing and building a scalable, high-performance data platform that will power the next generation of our product.

### **Are you + Bannerflow = True?**

We believe this is an opportunity for you who want to take the technical lead and define our data platform and best practices. Your work will directly impact customers and drive innovation in Ad Tech as part of an autonomous tech team. You'll tackle cutting-edge challenges in large-scale data processing, ML pipelines, and advanced analytics.


At Bannerflow, we live by our values of passion, collaboration, and challenge. You'll be part of a vibrant culture with activities like padel tournaments, webinars, Friday beers, and Level-up Hackathons. We offer a hybrid workplace and a competitive compensation package, including pension according to ITP1, health allowance, parental leave top-up, and health care insurance.

### **Your mission**

* Design and build scalable data pipelines for analytics and AI-driven features.
* Build on our existing lakehouse foundations to shape the architecture's next stage, balancing performance, flexibility, and cost.
* Ensure high data quality and reliability, implementing best practices in data modelling, governance and observability.
* Collaborate closely with our Data Analysts, Chief Architect, Engineers, and Product teams to create data-driven features and insights.
* Evaluate and implement new technologies to ensure a modern, scalable, and future-proof data stack.

### **So, what are we looking for?**

* 5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer/Data Platform Engineer/Data Lead, working with large-scale data processing.
* Strong knowledge of cloud data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Azure, or AWS).
* Experience working with data lake and lakehouse technologies (cloud storage solutions, Iceberg tables, Delta Lake, etc.).
* Experience with designing scalable architectures and pipelines that support large datasets efficiently.
* Passion for AI/ML-driven data features and enabling advanced analytics.
* Problem-solver mindset, you love optimizing performance and building robust systems.
* Curiosity & ownership – you thrive in an environment where you can experiment and improve.

### **Not sure if you check all the boxes? Apply anyway!**


We believe that mindset and passion are just as important as technical skills. If you have a software engineering background, love solving complex problems, and are a data nerd at heart, we’d love to hear from you, even if you don’t meet every requirement. We’re looking for the right person, not just the perfect resume. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities.


Join us at Bannerflow and help us build a world-class data platform that powers the future of Ad Tech!

title: Solution Owner - Integration Care
description:
We are looking for a Solution Owner to lead and evolve Integration Care, our Enterprise Integration Operations service used by midsized and enterprise clients across the Nordics. With a strong customer base and a central role in our portfolio, Integration Care is ready for its next phase of growth, and you will be at the heart of that journey.

### **About the role**


Integration Care is well established, but the integration landscape is rapidly shifting toward cloud-based and AI-driven solutions. This creates a significant opportunity to modernize our offering, sharpen our value proposition, and accelerate growth with both existing and new customers.


As Solution Owner, you will drive this transformation. You will own the success of the solution end-to-end, from value proposition and go-to-market strategy to commercial performance and portfolio alignment. Your first priority will be to refresh and clarify our go-to-market story to ensure strong relevance in today’s market.

### **Key responsibilities**

* Evolve the value proposition and positioning of Integration Care
* Define target customers and priority markets
* Lead go-to-market messaging with a strong focus on cloud- and AI-enabled integration operations
* Develop and maintain sales and marketing materials, including pricing and packaging
* Ensure CRM data, solution descriptions, and commercial assets are accurate and up to date
* Align Integration Care with the broader portfolio and strategic direction
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders to drive understanding, enablement, and sales success
* Support sales activities in a pre-sales and deal-shaping capacity
* Ensure solution development follows company processes and governance

### **How you will work**


This is a role for someone who enjoys combining strategic ownership with hands-on commercial impact. You will work closely with sales, delivery, and portfolio teams, with a strong focus on customer dialogue, value creation, and growth.


You will report to the Offering Owner for Enterprise Integration and work closely with our Portfolio team. We see Gothenburg as the primary location for this role, but we are open to other locations for the right candidate.

### **Who we believe will thrive**


We believe you are someone who combines commercial drive with technical understanding, and who enjoys turning complexity into clear customer value.


You likely bring:

* Experience in enterprise integration, middleware, or integration operations
* Strong understanding of cloud-based integration platforms and emerging AI capabilities
* A commercial mindset and confidence in customer dialogue
* The ability to translate technical capabilities into clear business value
* Comfort influencing across teams without direct line authority
* A strong motivation to modernize and grow a solution with high market potential

### **Why join us?**


At Epical, everything starts with trust. We combine deep technical expertise with a people-first mindset, and we believe in empowering our employees to shape both their own growth and the future of our business.


This is a unique opportunity to take full ownership of a strategically important solution and drive real impact, combining market insight, customer engagement, and hands-on commercial execution, with a central role in how we grow in a rapidly evolving integration landscape.

title: Solutions Engineer
description:
**Solutions Engineer (AI Platform)** 



* **Location:** 
 Stockholm - Hybrid
* **Job Type:** 
 Full-time
* **Tech Stack:** 
 TypeScript, Node.js, Next-Gen Developer Tools, Architecture, System design and API
* **Salary:** 
 100K to 125K SEK a Month



  





**About the Role** 




  





 We are working with a fast-growing tech company building a platform that turns business intent into reliable, production-ready software. As a Solutions Engineer, you won’t just write code in isolation; you will work directly with enterprise customers to transform complex operational workflows into robust software solutions.
 



  





 You’ll act as the bridge between their customers, Platform Engineers, and AI Engineering teams, ensuring they deliver massive value while continuously optimising their developer tools and workflow automations.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* **Translate Intent into Architecture:** 
 Partner with enterprise stakeholders to understand their workflows, constraints, and data landscapes, mapping them into clean system structures and data models.
* **Build & Deliver:** 
 Ship production-ready applications built on our proprietary platform using TypeScript and Node.js.
* **Bridge the Legacy Gap:** 
 Tackle the ultimate puzzle, integrating modern, AI-driven automation with complex, legacy enterprise systems and databases.
* **Collaborate Inward & Outward:** 
 Lead technical workshops with clients, and provide real-world insights to our internal AI teams to sharpen our developer workflows.



  





**Required:** 



* **The Technical Core:** 
 3+ years of professional software engineering experience building production systems using TypeScript/Node.js.
* **Enterprise Fluency:** 
 Proven ability to command a room, lead architecture discussions, and build instant credibility with enterprise stakeholders (including sceptical executives).
* **Real-World Resilience:** 
 Experience wrestling with "messy" data landscapes, APIs, and brownfield legacy systems.
* **High Empathy & Clear Communication:** 
 You listen to understand a user's actual workflow before jumping to solutions, and you can explain complex technical choices to non-technical folks with ease.



  





**Preferred:** 



* Background in a customer-facing engineering role (Solutions Engineering, Forward Deployed Engineering, or Technical Consulting).
* Experience working in highly regulated or operationally complex industries.
* Familiarity with leveraging next-gen coding agents (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) to accelerate your development workflow.



  





**This Role is NOT a Fit If:** 



* You prefer building in a silo. This role requires constant communication across GTM, platform teams, and clients.
* Your experience appears to be theoretical or limited to pristine "greenfield" projects. We deal with real-world enterprise infrastructure every day.
* You are intimidated by executive-level stakeholders.



  





 Interviews happening this week, apply now!

title: Director - Workplace Technology
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 As our Director of Workplace Technology, you will architect and operationalise the AI-enabled infrastructure that powers Legora’s global scale. You will design and build the systems, automations, and processes that ensure we operate with precision, speed, and minimal overhead - creating an operational foundation that is robust, auditable, and built to scale seamlessly.
   

  

**Your mandate is simple:** 
 Build the most automated, AI-powered, operationally excellent organisation - empower our staff to do more with less.
   

  

 You will partner across Product, Engineering, GTM, and Legal to translate organisational complexity into elegant, scalable architectures and ensure that meaningful leverage comes from technology not people.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

 You will have direct ownership over how Legora operates and scales. The systems, automations, and processes you design will materially impact the business.
   

  

 In this role, you will operate as the end-to-end owner of our operational systems and AI-enabled workflows, responsible for:
   

  

* Leading complex, cross-functional operational initiatives across IT, Revenue Operations, Product Operations, Finance, and People
* Translating ambiguous business needs into structured requirements, implementation roadmaps, and measurable success metrics
* Designing, implementing, and owning AI-enabled systems and automations that replace manual workflows
* Building and maintaining the integrations that connect our operational stack end to end
* Identifying bottlenecks and eliminating them through tooling, automation, and smarter system design
* Establishing governance, documentation, and lifecycle standards to ensure durability and accountability
* Creating visibility through dashboards and KPI frameworks that drive disciplined decision-making
* Owning operational simplicity and leverage across the organisation


 You will define how a lean, AI-first company should operate - and ensure it actually happens.
   

  

 Who You Are
   

  

 You are an execution-focused systems builder with strong ownership and sound judgment. You don’t just improve processes - you take responsibility for making them work. You believe exceptional organisations stay lean by design - and you are ready to own the systems that make that possible.
   

  

**You Bring**
* 7–12+ years of experience in operations, systems management, solutions engineering, or process design in high-growth environments
* A proven track record of implementing software, building integrations, and automating workflows end to end
* Strong technical fluency and comfort designing scalable, event-driven architectures in the cloud
* Experience aligning technical and non-technical stakeholders around outcomes
* A structured, analytical mindset with a bias toward automation over coordination
* Comfort operating in dynamic environments where systems must be built, not inherited


 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 This is a foundational role. The systems and processes you build will determine how we scale - not by adding people, but by adding capability. You will help create an organisation where AI is embedded in every workflow, where operations run with speed and precision, and where a small, exceptional team can achieve what typically takes hundreds.
   

  

 If we succeed, it will be because we built one of the most automated, AI-native operational engines in the world - and you will have been the architect behind it.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: DIGITAL ANALYST
description:
**Digital Analyst - E-commerce performance**
 Scandinavian Airlines (SAS) is looking for a Digital Analyst to strengthen our Digital Sales organization and support the continuous optimization of our e-commerce performance. As part of SAS’s broader digital transformation, this role will play a key part in enabling a more data-driven, insight-led commercial organization.
   

  

 You will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, helping e-commerce teams understand performance, identify opportunities, and make better decisions across the digital customer journey. This includes delivering actionable insights, improving tracking and reporting foundations, attribution models, and supporting experimentation and optimization initiatives across web, app, and marketing channels.
   

  

 This role is suited for someone who enjoys hands-on analysis, working close to the business, and collaborating across functions in a fast-paced digital environment, with the opportunity to shape how data is used to drive commercial impact, at scale.
   

  

**Challenges You Will Work On**
* Turning large volumes of digital and e‑commerce data into clear, actionable insights that support day‑to‑day decision making
* Understanding and optimizing complex customer journeys across multiple touchpoints and channels
* Ensuring high-quality tracking and data reliability across digital platforms, in collaboration with product, digital, and IT teams
* Balancing ad‑hoc insight requests with recurring reporting needs in a fast-paced environment
* Supporting teams in becoming more data self-sufficient through improved dashboards and reporting solutions
* Helping stakeholders interpret performance correctly and avoid misreading metrics or attribution results
* Working in a test‑and‑learn culture where experimentation, iteration, and learning from failures are encouraged
* Exploring how AI and automation can streamline recurring reporting and free up time for higher-value analysis


**Key Responsibilities**
* Analyze e‑commerce performance with a focus on conversion rate (CR) and cost per acquisition (CPA)
* Deliver regular reports and ad‑hoc analyses to e‑commerce managers and other stakeholders
* Conduct funnel, journey, and behavioral analyses to identify optimization opportunities
* Support campaign and attribution analysis together with paid media and performance teams
* Enable and improve self-service reporting using Google Analytics and related tools
* Verify, implement, and troubleshoot tracking using Google Tag Manager
* Support setup, analysis, and follow‑up of A/B tests and experiments
* Collaborate closely with e‑commerce, product, digital, and IT teams to align measurement and insights with business needs
* Contribute to maintaining and evolving existing KPIs, and support the definition of new ones when needed
* Identify and implement opportunities to automate recurring reports and data workflows, reducing manual effort across the team Explore and test AI-assisted tools and methods to enhance analysis, reporting efficiency, and insight generation


**The Team**
 You’ll join a growing Digital Sales team within eCommerce, responsible for driving digital revenue through performance marketing, optimization of our web and app channels, SEO/SEM, and data-driven analytics. We work closely with Digital/IT, Brand & Marketing, Partnerships, Inflight, and Analytics, and the wider Commercial organization to deliver aligned, high-impact initiatives. Together, we’re building a modern and scalable digital ecosystem that supports SAS’s global commercial goals.
   

  

**To be successful we believe you have**
* Experience working hands-on with Google Analytics and a good understanding of core e‑commerce metrics
* The ability to analyze data and translate it into clear insights that support business decisions
* Basic experience with SQL and a willingness to continue developing your technical skills
* Hands-on experience with A/B testing and an understanding of experimentation principles
* Confidence working with tracking and tagging, especially using Google Tag Manager
* A pragmatic, problem‑solving mindset and enjoyment in digging into details when needed
* Strong collaboration skills and the ability to work with multiple stakeholders across different teams
* Openness to feedback, learning, and experimenting in a fast-paced, “fail fast” environment
* Good communication skills, enabling you to explain data and insights to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Exposure to BI or visualization tools such as Looker, Power BI, or similar


**It’s a Plus If You Also Have**
* Experience working with BigQuery or other cloud-based data warehouses
* Familiarity with experimentation or CRO tools (e.g. Optimizely, VWO, or similar)
* Basic knowledge of Python or R for data analysis or automation
* Experience working with attribution models or media performance analysis
* Previous experience in e‑commerce, travel, or large-scale digital environments
* Interest in continuously improving how data, tracking, and insights are used across teams
* Experience using AI tools to supported data analysis, documentation, or reporting workflows
* Interests in automation of data pipelines or report generation using Python, SQL scheduling, or BI tool features


**Why SAS?**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 29/05/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: As soon as possible.
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period.
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.


 Come and fly with us!
   

  

 Why SAS?
   

  

 Additional information

title: Enterprise Sales Manager(Stockholm,Hybrid)
description:
****Who are we?****
**Besedo** 
 is a
 **tech company** 
 delivering
 **Trust & Safety solutions** 
 to online marketplaces worldwide. Every year, we review and moderate over
 **500 million pieces of user-generated content** 
 and block more than
 **40 million fraud attempts** 
 – helping online platforms stay safe and trusted for millions of users.
   

  

 Besedo has
 **headquarters in Stockholm (Sweden)** 
 and employs over 300+ employees in
 **5 offices in different countries.**
**Implio** 
 is our
 **all-in-one SaaS moderation platform** 
 that combines state-of-the-art AI (deep learning, NLP, computer vision) with a powerful user interface for human moderation and advanced analytics. The result is an easy-to-use content moderation solution that enables companies to reduce risks, protect their users and build safer online environments.
   

  

 Learn more about Implio in this video, and discover more about Besedo on our website.
   

  

****Overview:****
 The
 **Enterprise Sales Manager** 
 is responsible for identifying, pursuing, and closing new enterprise business across key target markets. This is a hunter role: the primary focus is net-new logo acquisition and the development of a high-quality pipeline from outbound prospecting, partnership channels, and inbound qualification.
   

  

 Operating at the intersection of consultative selling and deep technical credibility, the Enterprise Sales Manager will engage senior stakeholders across complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles — from initial discovery through to contract signature. This role requires a blend of strategic thinking, commercial rigour, and the ability to navigate enterprise procurement processes at global scale.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities:****
* New Business Development
* Build and manage a qualified pipeline of enterprise prospects through outbound prospecting, event-based networking, partner channels, and inbound lead development.
* Identify, research, and engage target accounts that align with Besedo's ideal customer profile — with a focus on marketplace, classifieds, and platform businesses operating at scale.
* Lead the end-to-end sales process from initial outreach and discovery through to proposal, commercial negotiation, and contract close.
* Own the sales cycle with accountability for conversion rates, deal velocity, and accurate revenue forecasting.


 3.
 **Stakeholder Engagement & Executive Access**
* Consultative Selling & Solution Design
* Conduct deep-dive discovery with prospective customers to understand their trust and safety challenges, moderation workflows, technical architecture, and business objectives.
* Develop and deliver compelling value propositions tailored to the prospect's context — translating the Besedo Platform's capabilities into measurable commercial and operational outcomes.
* Partner with Solution Engineers to design scalable solutions for complex enterprise requirements, including API integrations, multi-market deployments, and custom configurations.
* Craft and present proposals, business cases, and ROI frameworks that land with both technical and commercial decision-makers.
* Build and maintain multi-threaded relationships across prospect organisations, engaging CTO, CPO, CFO, Procurement, and Trust & Safety stakeholders simultaneously.
* Develop and execute account entry strategies that create senior-level access quickly and build credibility with technical and commercial audiences alike.
* Facilitate executive sponsor engagement — including C-level alignment conversations — to accelerate deal progression and secure organisational commitment.
* Commercial Management & Deal Execution
* Lead commercial negotiations including pricing strategy, contract structure, MSA and DPA terms, and multi-year agreement design.
* Work closely with Legal, Finance, and Operations to ensure that deal terms are commercially sound and operationally deliverable.
* Maintain rigorous pipeline hygiene and accurate forecasting in CRM; provide reliable commit and upside visibility to sales leadership on a weekly basis.
* Identify and mitigate deal risks proactively — including competitive threats, procurement delays, and internal stakeholder misalignment.
* Market Intelligence & Cross-Functional Contribution.
* Develop a deep understanding of the competitive landscape — including positioning against alternative moderation and trust & safety solutions — and bring that intelligence into every sales engagement.
* Feed prospect and market insights back to Product, Marketing, and Customer Success to sharpen go-to-market messaging, ICP definition, and roadmap prioritisation.
* Collaborate with Marketing on demand generation activities, account-based campaigns, and event participation that support pipeline creation.
* Contribute to the development of sales playbooks, proposal templates, and competitive battle cards as the function scales.


****Qualifications and Experience:****
* 5–10 years of experience in enterprise B2B SaaS sales, with a consistent record of net-new logo acquisition and quota attainment.
* Demonstrated ability to run complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles from prospecting to close — with deal values of €200K+ ARR.
* Strong technical acumen: comfortable discussing API-based integrations, cloud architecture, data workflows, and enterprise security requirements without reliance on a solutions engineer for every conversation.
* Experience negotiating enterprise contracts — including pricing, MSA, DPA, and security/compliance terms — in collaboration with Legal and Finance. P
* Proven ability to build C-level relationships and engage executive audiences with credibility and commercial insight.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; able to adapt tone and depth for technical, commercial, and executive audiences.
* Fluency in English is required, proficiency in additional European Languages (e.g. German, French, Spanish) is highly beneficial and actively sought.


**Preferred**
* Background in trust & safety, content moderation, fraud detection, or adjacent SaaS categories.
* Experience selling into marketplace, classifieds, platform, or fintech businesses.
* Familiarity with consultative and challenger-style sales methodologies (e.g. MEDDIC, SPIN, Challenger Sale).
* Track record of building pipeline from near-zero in a scaling or early-stage enterprise sales function
* Proficiency with HubSpot or equivalent CRM, and comfort with account planning frameworks.


****What we Offer:****
* A greenfield enterprise sales opportunity — we have a growing pipeline, a reference customer base, and a differentiated product in a market that is actively looking for better solutions.
* Competitive base salary with uncapped commission and accelerators above quota.
* Primary focused on the UK and Nordic markets..
* Supported by Marketing and Solutions Engineering.
* A collaborative, commercially-oriented environment where sales insight directly shapes product and go-to-market strategy.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Why choose Coody**
 At Coody, We Cut Out Everything Unnecessary To Give More Back To You As a Consultant. And We Have Done It In The Package Of a Lean And Efficient Organization, Meaning No Overpaid Managers, No Fancy Offices And No Extravagant Conferences. Instead We Give You
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
**What You’ll Be Doing**
 As a
 **Senior Machine Learning Engineer** 
 at Coody, you'll take on fullstack Machine Learning Assignments covering the full spectra from GenAI, developing and training models in production, and building cloud platforms where they can run. Each assignment is 6–24 months and will give you both broadness and deepness from various industries and companies. Often, we play a key role for the project, product and team we work in. You will dive into complex systems, ramping up fast, and delivering real impact from day one. Beyond coding and training models, you’ll influence product direction, and fostering a collaborative, high-trust team culture.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 We believe that you have about
 **4+ years of experience** 
 and a proven track record of delivering real results within Machine Learning. If you’ve got the following, you’re probably a great fit:
   

  

* A track-record of building and training ML models in production
* Cloud experience (AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with commonly used data tools (e.g., Spark, Dask, PySpark, Apache Beam)
* Expertise in Python and modern ML/AI libraries (PyTorch/TensorFlow, Transformers, LangChain, LangGraph, Vertex AI)
* Strong understanding of ML infrastructure: deployment, monitoring, debugging, optimization
* A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, or similar
* You must be based in Sweden with a Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)


**This is Coody**
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.

description:

 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision.  1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to

 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.

title: Säljande konsultchef
description:
Säljande konsultchef – Stockholm
   

  

 Vår kund är en svenskägd internationell bolagsgrupp som arbetar med konsult- och projektleveranser mot den tillverkande industrin. Nu söker vi dig som trivs i rollen som ledare och har erfarenhet av att driva affär, bygga team och utveckla konsultverksamhet. I rollen som säljande konsultchef kommer du att ha ett helhetsansvar för att utveckla och stärka Stockholmsverksamheten, både affärsmässigt och organisatoriskt, i en situation som kräver tydligt ledarskap och ett starkt affärsdriv.
   

  

**I detta åtagande ingår:**
* Driva och utveckla affären i Stockholm med fullt resultatansvar
* Aktiv nykundsbearbetning samt vidareutveckling av befintliga kunder
* Sälja både konsultlösningar och projektåtaganden
* Rekrytera, leda och utveckla konsulter samt säkerställa beläggning
* Bygga upp verksamheten med målsättning att växa teamet med 6–8 konsulter per år
* Skapa en balanserad affär mellan projektleveranser och konsultuppdrag
* Verksamhetsutveckla med fokus på struktur, tillväxt och lönsamhet


**Din bakgrund**
* Erfarenhet av konsultverksamhet, exempelvis som konsultchef, affärsansvarig
* Dokumenterad förmåga att sälja konsult- och/eller projektaffärer
* Stark förståelse för produktutveckling inom industriella verksamheter
* Förmåga att skapa affärer via relationer och etablerade kundkontakter
* Erfarenhet av att rekrytera, bygga team och driva tillväxt
* Van att arbeta med budget- och resultatansvar
* Självgående, affärsdriven och trygg i att ta ansvar


**Mer om uppdraget**
 Vår kund är flexibel och kan erbjuda rollen antingen för dig som interimskonsult eller genom en direkt anställning. Vänligen ansök snarast!
   

  

 För oss handlar samarbete om att vara professionella, tydliga, pålitliga och med full respekt för ditt uppdrag och ansvar. Samtidigt tror vi starkt på att glädje och energi skapar bättre resultat, både för dig och kunden. Vi gör det här tillsammans, som en långsiktig partner snarare än en förmedlare. När du samarbetar med oss ska det kännas tryggt, engagerande och utvecklande varje gång.
   

  

**Kontakt**
 För frågor om tjänsten kontakta Mattias Lyckberg, 0733-336080, på Intenso Interim Management.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
**Om Intenso Interim Management**
*Intenso Interim Management tillhandahåller interimschefer för alla branscher och erfarna konsulter inom försäljning, teknik och IT. Intenso Interim Management ingår i Intensogruppen, som är en rikstäckande helhetsleverantör av rekryteringstjänster. I Intensogruppen ingår även Säljpoolen och Intenso Teknikrekrytering som nischade rekryteringsbolag.*

title: Senior ServiceNow Technical Consultant
description:
**Senior ServiceNow Technical Consultant – Stockholm (Hybrid)** 




  





 Are you ready to take the next step in your ServiceNow career with a company that’s growing fast, investing heavily in its people, and consistently recognised for excellence?
 



 We’re hiring a Senior ServiceNow Technical Consultant to join a multi-award-winning, forward-thinking organisation based in Stockholm. This is an exciting opportunity to work closely with clients and internal stakeholders to deliver innovative ServiceNow solutions that drive real business value, while being part of a collaborative and ambitious team.
 



  





**What you’ll be doing** 



* Leading client-facing workshops to understand business requirements and define ServiceNow solutions
* Advising customers on best practice, platform capabilities, and digital workflow optimisation
* Designing and implementing scalable ServiceNow solutions across key modules such as ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, or CSM
* Acting as a trusted technical advisor throughout the full project lifecycle
* Collaborating with developers, architects, and project teams to ensure successful delivery
* Supporting pre-sales activities, solution demonstrations, and technical discussions where required
* Mentoring junior consultants and contributing to continuous improvement and best practices



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* Strong experience working with the ServiceNow platform in a technical consulting, implementation, or solution-focused role
* Excellent understanding of ServiceNow modules, workflows, integrations, and platform capabilities
* Ability to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions
* Experience engaging with stakeholders and leading customer discussions/workshops
* Knowledge of Agile delivery methodologies
* ServiceNow certifications would be highly beneficial
* Fluent Swedish and English speaker
* Excellent communication skills with a proactive and consultative mindset



  





**Why join us?** 



* Multi-award-winning business with a strong reputation in its sector
* Fast-growing and dynamic environment with exciting projects
* Heavy investment in training & development (certifications, learning pathways, mentorship)
* Clear career progression with opportunities to move into leadership or specialist roles
* Excellent benefits package, including competitive salary, bonus, pension, and wellness initiatives
* Collaborative and inclusive culture where your ideas genuinely make an impact



  





 Thank you for your interest in this opportunity. If your application is successful, we will contact you to discuss the position in more detail within 48 hours of receiving your CV. Please assume your application has been unsuccessful if you do not hear back from us within 48 hours.

title: Cloud Architect – Senior Consultant
description:
Deloitte is a leading global provider of audit and assurance, consulting, financial advisory, risk advisory, tax, and related services. During its 175-year history, our organization has grown tremendously in both scale and capabilities. Deloitte currently has approximately 457,000 people in more than 150 countries and territories and serves four out of five Fortune Global 500® companies. Yet, our shared culture and mission—to make an impact that matters—remains unchanged.
   

  

  




**Job Description**

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Cloud Architect** 
 with 3-5 years’ experience to join our organization. In this role, you will design, architect, and implement scalable cloud solutions across major hyperscaler platforms. You will work with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into robust, secure, and cost-effective cloud architectures while providing strategic consulting guidance to clients and stakeholders.
   

  

  





**Key Responsibilities**



* **Cloud Architecture Design** 
 : Design and architect enterprise-grade cloud solutions on AWS, Azure, and/or Google Cloud Platform (GCP), ensuring scalability, security, and performance
* **Hyperscaler Integration** 
 : Lead integration efforts across multiple cloud platforms, managing multi-cloud and hybrid cloud environments
* **Custom Development Oversight** 
 : Guide and review custom development initiatives, ensuring alignment with cloud best practices and architectural standards
* **Systems Integration** 
 : Design and implement complex integrations between cloud services, on-premises systems, and third-party applications
* **Consulting & Advisory** 
 : Provide strategic consulting to clients on cloud adoption, migration strategies, and digital transformation initiatives
* **Solution Implementation** 
 : Collaborate with development teams to implement cloud solutions, ensuring adherence to architectural standards and security protocols
* **Documentation & Governance** 
 : Create comprehensive architecture documentation, design patterns, and governance frameworks
* **Performance Optimization** 
 : Monitor, analyze, and optimize cloud infrastructure for cost, performance, and reliability
* **Stakeholder Engagement** 
 : Present technical solutions and recommendations to executive and technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**
* **Master's Degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent professional certification**
* Acceptable certifications include: AWS Solutions Architect Professional, Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Google Cloud Architect, or similar advanced cloud architecture credentials


**Experience**
* **3-5 years of professional experience** 
 as a Cloud Architect, Solutions Architect, or similar role
* **Demonstrated expertise in at least two major cloud platforms:** 
 Amazon Web Services (AWS)/Microsoft Azure/Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* **Custom Development Experience** 
 : 2+ years working with custom application development in cloud environments
	+ Proficiency with modern programming languages (Java, Python, .NET, Node.js, Go, or similar)
	+ Understanding of application design patterns and cloud-native development practices
* **Integration Architecture** 
 : 2+ years designing and implementing enterprise integrations
	+ APIs and RESTful services
	+ Microservices architecture
	+ Message queues and event-driven architectures
	+ ETL pipelines and data integration
	+ iPaaS and integration platforms


**Technical Skills**
* **Cloud Platforms** 
 : Deep knowledge of:
	+ **AWS** 
	 : EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, CloudFormation, API Gateway, ECS/EKS
	+ **Azure** 
	 : Virtual Machines, App Services, SQL Database, Azure DevOps, Azure Functions, AKS
	+ **GCP** 
	 : Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, BigQuery, Cloud Functions, GKE
* **Architecture Patterns** 
 : Expertise in:
	+ Microservices and service-oriented architecture
	+ Serverless computing
	+ Containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
	+ Distributed systems and scalability patterns
* **Integration Technologies** 
 :
	+ API management and API gateways
	+ Message brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka, AWS SQS/SNS)
	+ ETL and data integration tools
	+ iPaaS solutions (MuleSoft, Boomi, or similar)
* **Infrastructure as Code** 
 : Proficiency with at least two of: Terraform/CloudFormation/ARM templates/Ansible or similar tools
* **DevOps & CI/CD** 
 :
	+ CI/CD pipeline design and implementation
	+ Containerization and orchestration
	+ Infrastructure automation
	+ Monitoring and logging solutions


**Professional Competencies**
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* + 2 years
 **consulting experience** 
 , providing technical consulting or advisory services
* Experience from FSI and/or public sector
* Excellent communication and presentation abilities in Swedish and English
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders
* Project management and stakeholder engagement experience
* Proven ability to work in fast-paced, collaborative environments
* Strategic thinking and business acumen


**Additional Information**

 At Deloitte, we are committed to helping our employees grow and develop throughout their career. We offer a range of on-the-job learning experiences, formal development programs at Deloitte University, and access to a personal coach to support you in identifying and utilizing your strengths. We also provide the necessary training and resources for you to obtain various certifications to further advance in your career.
   

  

  





 Our culture is built on collaboration and innovation. We value diverse perspectives and encourage our employees to think creatively to find the best solutions for our clients. We work hand-in-hand with our clients to understand their unique needs and to develop tailored solutions that drive growth and innovation. At Deloitte, you´ll have the chance to grow and succeed alongside like-minded professionals who share your passion.
   

  

  





**How to Apply**




 You apply online. Your application should consist of:
   

  

  




* CV
* Letter of motivation
	+ Why you are interested in Deloitte and the role as a consultant
	+ What you think you can contribute with and bring to the role


**Please submit your application as soon as possible, as we work with ongoing selection.**

 At Deloitte, we value different skills, perspectives, and experiences, as it enables us to effectively solve complex challenges for our clients. We encourage you to apply for the position if you believe your skills can contribute to our team’s success.
   

  

  





*As a qualitative part of Deloitte’s recruitment process, our final candidates undergo a background check, to increase awareness of our future employees, secure the working environment for our employees and meet regulatory requirements. The background check process is carried out in collaboration with ToFindOut. https://tofindout.se/en/background-check/*




**Questions?**




 If you have any questions regarding the role or the application process, please contact Anna Taube, Manager Talent Acquisition, at ataube@deloitte.se.
   

  

  





**We are looking forward to your application!**




 For further information on Deloitte, please visit www.deloitte.se
   

  

  





**What impact will you make?**




 Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. We do not just aspire to make solutions. We wish to create an impact that makes a positive and crucial difference for the people around us, our clients and our society. Deloitte is where you’ll find unlimited opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.

title: DataOps Engineer
description:
**About The Job**
 Are you looking for a role where your engineering skills create real business value? As a DataOps Engineer in NOBA Bank Group, you’ll be instrumental in ensuring that raw data is efficiently transformed into structured, high-quality assets. You’ll play a key role in modernizing and maintaining our data infrastructure, implementing new technologies, and enabling the organization to innovate and grow through reliable, accessible, and well-managed data operations.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Data & Analytics Engineering department brings together specialists in data infrastructure, analytics, and data management. Together we build a modern and reliable data foundation that supports decision making across the business. This role is for Data Management & New Initiatives team under Data & Analytics Engineering department.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll design, develop, and maintain robust data pipelines, partner with teams across the bank, and ensure that business critical data needs are met. You will take responsibility for ensuring continuous operations of our data warehouse across all domains, making sure daily processes run smoothly and data is readily accessible for all users. You’ll also monitor data infrastructure performance, proactively troubleshoot issues, and collaborate with other engineers to develop our security and business continuity best-practices.
   

  

 This is a great opportunity to enjoy a high degree of self-responsibility and expand your expertise into areas of your interest. You’ll collaborate broadly and see the tangible results of your work.
   

  

 We offer a hybrid working model with two common in-office days. While we value flexibility, we also prioritize collaboration, team building, and enjoying fikas and after work gatherings together!
   

  

**Main Tasks**
* Design, build, and maintain data pipelines using Databricks and dbt.
* Implement and manage CI/CD pipelines for data workflows.
* Collaborate with data engineers, analysts, and DevOps teams to ensure robust, scalable, and reliable data operations.
* Monitor data infrastructure performance and proactively perform troubleshooting to ensure high availability and reliability.
* Ensure data quality, security, and compliance throughout the data lifecycle.
* Monitor data infrastructure performance and proactively perform troubleshooting to ensure high availability and reliability.
* Enhance data usage and accessibility by applying modern data engineering practices
* Document processes and contribute to best practices.


**We Are Looking For You Who**
 Enjoys working at the intersection of data engineering and operations, ensuring that data infrastructure is robust, efficient, and reliable. You are passionate about automating processes, monitoring systems, and proactively resolving issues to keep data flowing smoothly across the organization.
   

  

 You are proactive and detail-oriented, with a genuine curiosity for new technologies and best practices in Data. You thrive in collaborative environments, approach challenges with a “can-do” mindset, and enjoy transforming complex operational problems into practical, scalable solutions. You value a high degree of self-responsibility and are motivated to expand your expertise in areas that interest you, contributing to both the stability and innovation of our data platform.
   

  

**For This Role, You’ll Need**
* Experience working in DataOps/ AI Ops, Data Engineering, or similar technical role focused on data infrastructure and operations.
* An academic degree in a relevant field such as data engineering, computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline.
* Strong proficiency in ETL processes and data logic, with a solid understanding of how data is sourced, transformed, and delivered to end users.
* Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure's data stack
* Practical experience working with both Databricks and dbt in a production environment.
* Ability to manage and automate data infrastructure resources (e.g., clusters, SQL Warehouses, permissions).
* Solid understanding of DevOps practices, including experience with version control systems and CI/CD tools.
* Excellent English communication skills, with a good understanding of Norwegian and/or Swedish considered an advantage.


 It's Positive If You Have
   

  

* Previous experience in data-focused roles within the financial sector.
* Familiarity with Agile and Scrum methodologies.
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code


**Our offer to you**
* Freedom with responsibility: Flexible working arrangements to suit your work style and a high degree of self-responsibility.
* Career development: Opportunities to grow and develop in your role, and to expand your expertise into areas of your interest.
* Feedback culture: A supportive environment that encourages open communication.
* Coaching leadership: Managers who guide and support your career journey.
* A caring company culture: We genuinely care about each other!


 You’ll also have the chance to work with cutting-edge data technologies and be part of shaping the future of NOBA’s data landscape.
   

  

 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values: we are
 **wholehearted** 
 , we
 **collaborate** 
 and we
 **take the lead** 
 .
   

  

**Practical Information**
 Start: As soon as possible
   

  

 Location: Oslo/Stockholm
   

  

 Form of employment: Permanent position with probation period
   

  

 Extent: Full-time
   

  

 Working hours: Regular office hours
   

  

 Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?
   

  

 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Engagement Manager
description:
**Description**
 The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a highly skilled and versatile Engagement Manager (EM) to join our team and lead the delivery of complex cloud solution projects. In this role you will combine technical expertise with strong project leadership skills to drive successful implementations of AWS-based solutions for our clients. You will bridge business requirements with technical solutions, facilitating technical discussions and ensuring alignment with customer outcomes. Applying AWS frameworks like Well-Architected and Cloud Adoption Framework while demonstrating technical credibility across diverse stakeholders, you will distill customer needs into clear technical requirements, decompose complex problems, and make informed trade-off decisions considering performance, scalability, security, and business impact.
   

  

 Possessing strong technology and program/project management experience, you will validate technical solutions against business goals, recognize when additional technical evaluation is needed, and manage technical risks. You will be expected to achieve and maintain relevant AWS certifications, develop domain-specific expertise, and effectively communicate technical concepts to both technical and business audiences. As you progress, you’ll lead increasingly complex technical projects, shape cross-organizational technical strategies, and establish best practices in your domain. In this role you will apply your management and leadership capabilities to successfully execute project plans, proactively identify and manage risks, resolve issues, escalate when appropriate, and drive projects to successful completion, while exceeding customer expectation
   

  

 The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of solutions, technologies, and industries.
   

  

* This role requires you to be a Swedish National and have business level proficiency in the Swedish language.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As an experienced technology program/project manager, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Leading and managing complex cloud migration and implementation projects
* Leveraging comprehensive knowledge of AWS services, architectures, and best practices to guide technical decisions and strategic planning
* Bridging business requirements with technical solutions, facilitating engineering discussions and ensuring alignment with customer business outcomes
* Distilling customer needs into clear technical requirements and map them to business outcomes
* Decomposing complex technical problems into actionable, deliverable solutions
* Contributing to technical documentation and define documentation standards


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences: AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job below, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture - Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship & Career Growth - We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance - We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3+ years of experience in cloud computing
* 3 + years Experience in project management of technical programs
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, related field, or equivalent experience
* Experience in program or engagement management, leading other project managers to deliver a program with multiple and concurrent projects
* Experience with Agile and project management toolsets like Jira, Rally, VersionOne or Taiga


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with and presenting to C-level executives, IT, and lines of businesses across organizations or equivalent
* AWS experience preferred
* Project Management Professional (PMP) and/or AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
* Strong understanding of AWS services, architectures, and best practices
* Experience applying AWS frameworks like Well-Architected and Cloud Adoption Framework
* Proven ability to establish technical credibility with engineering teams and senior technical decision-makers
