 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch)
   

  

 Job ID: A10432913

title: Resident Consultant, Sweden
description:
The Opportunity
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced Consultant to join our Professional Services team in Sweden. As a Resident Consultant, you will play a key role in helping our clients define their architectural vision, design and deploy complex environments, and manage and optimize their Nutanix-based infrastructures.
   

  

 You will work closely with customers to ensure the success of their digital transformation journey — from initial design to full implementation — while delivering exceptional value and trusted technical expertise.
   

  

 Professional Services at Nutanix
   

  

 The Nutanix Professional Services team drives customer success by ensuring smooth and impactful deployments of our solutions.
   

  

 We partner with clients throughout their software-defined data center (SDDC) journey — from strategy and architecture to design, implementation, integration, and automation.
   

  

 Our mission is to enable customers to realize the full potential of their Nutanix environment, supported by a culture of collaboration, learning, and continuous improvement.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

* Administer, operate, and support your customer’s Nutanix and VMware environments.
* Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure issues, develop growth plans, and generate performance reports based on customer trends.
* Lead architectural strategy initiatives in collaboration with customer architecture and engineering teams.
* Act as a trusted advisor, providing guidance on Nutanix and VMware best practices, and recommending architectural or engineering improvements.
* Partner with the Nutanix Sales Team to identify new opportunities and maintain clear communication on customer progress and project updates.
* Deliver hands-on implementation, including physical setup of servers and installation of Nutanix software (ability to lift up to 20–25 kg).


 What You’ll Bring
   

  

* A calm, professional approach and a passion for helping others succeed.
* 10+ years of experience as a virtualization or infrastructure consultant.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Strong expertise in VMware ESX and data center virtualization, ideally with experience in Nutanix Enterprise Cloud Platform.
* 3 to 5 years of experience in automation solutions.
* Proficiency in infrastructure as code (IaC) tools such as Terraform, Ansible, and VMware Aria.
* Experience with VDI (ideally Horizon and Citrix)
* Strong programming skills in languages like Python, Bash, and PowerShell.
* Deep understanding of storage and data protection technologies (replication, snapshots, backup, restore, etc.).
* Proven ability to analyze and resolve complex, cross-platform issues.
* Hands-on approach and commitment to delivering outstanding customer experiences.
* Comfort with leading workshops, whiteboarding sessions, and presenting to both technical and business audiences.
* Languages: Fluent in English and Swedish

title: Senior Workplace Engineer (Tech Lead) – Entra ID, Solna
description:
PostNord är igång med en strategisk transformation rörande våra katalogtjänster (Microsoft Active Directory och Azure AD/Entra ID) och bygger en modern, säker och långsiktig plattform internt. Nu söker vi en erfaren Workplace Engineer som vill leda arbetet och forma vår framtida identitets- och katalogarkitektur.
   

  

 Det här är en central och högt prioriterad roll där du får möjlighet att driva förändring, påverka tekniska beslut på både operativ och strategisk nivå, och bli en viktig del av vår långsiktiga arkitektur.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Senior Workplace Engineer (Tech Lead) För Directory Services Har Du End-to-end-ansvar För PostNords AD- Och Entra ID-plattform – Från Målbild Och Roadmap Till Design, Implementation Och Stabil Drift. Du Säkerställer Kontinuerlig Förbättring Och Vidareutveckling Av Tjänsterna Enligt En Modern Och Säker Identitetsarkitektur. I Uppdraget Ingår Att
   

  

* Förvalta och vidareutveckla plattformen (miljö, beroenden, risker) med fokus på stabil drift och förbättringar.
* Ta fram och äga en 3–5-årig roadmap för AD/Entra ID (målbild, prioriteringar, teknisk skuld, livscykel).
* Sätta designprinciper/standarder och säkerställa best practice, säkerhet och efterlevnad.
* Vara teknisk huvudansvarig i förändringar: design, implementation, felsökning och stabil drift.


**Mandat och samarbete:** 
 Du tar dagliga tekniska beslut inom plattformens scope, driver förbättringar och agerar rådgivande i arkitektur- och säkerhetsfrågor kopplade till identitet. Du arbetar nära IAM-teamets produktägare och Workplace Team Lead kring planering och prioritering, samt samverkar med säkerhet, infrastruktur och applikationsteam. I rollen ingår att stötta teamet genom coaching, onboarding och kompetensutveckling.
   

  

**Skall-krav (obligatoriska)**
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet av IT-drift/förvaltning i enterprise-miljö.
* Mycket god kompetens i AD DS och Azure AD/Entra ID i hybridmiljö (design, implementation, felsökning).
* Stark kompetens inom IAM (identitetslivscykel, autentisering/auktorisation och åtkomststyrning).
* Stark analytisk förmåga (rotorsaksanalys samt risk- och konsekvensbedömning).
* Erfarenhet av system-/lösningsarkitektur för plattformstjänster (säkerhet, skalbarhet, HA).
* Vana att arbeta i hybrid/distribuerade team och samverka tvärfunktionellt.
* Erfarenhet av att driva vidareutveckling och förändringar i förvaltning (planering, genomförande och stabilisering i drift).
* Självgående och strukturerad, med god prioriterings- och leveransförmåga.
* Mycket god kommunikation på svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift (tekniska och icke-tekniska målgrupper).


**Bör-krav (meriterande)**
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt (t.ex. SAFe, Scrum eller Kanban).
* Erfarenhet från post/logistik, e-handel eller retail.
* Erfarenhet av att leda, coacha och utveckla kollegor.


**Utbildning och certifieringar**
* Relevant utbildning inom IT/systemvetenskap – eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Meriterande certifieringar: AD/AAD/Entra ID (t.ex. AZ-104, AZ-500, SC-900, SC-200, MS-100).


**Du ska må bra**
 Vi är ett modernt kundorienterat företag som tänker lika mycket på våra anställda som på våra kunder. Hos oss erbjuds du ett omväxlande arbete i en internationell miljö med ständigt nya utmaningar och snabba beslut. Förutom schyssta anställningsvillkor enligt kollektivavtal erbjuds du:
   

  

* Flexibel hybrid arbetsplats. Se filmen om vårt kontor.
* Goda utvecklings- och karriärmöjligheter
* Goda försäkrings- och tjänstepensionsvillkor
* Friskvårdsbidrag samt möjlighet att träna på Arkens gym och simhall
* Personalförmåner genom PostNord Plus - vår personalstiftelse


**Vad väntar du på?**
 Välkommen med din ansökan. Urval sker löpande så ansök så snart som möjligt. Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen kan vissa tjänster kräva en bakgrundskontroll. Om du går vidare till ett steg där en bakgrundskontroll är aktuell kommer du att informeras i förväg.
   

  

 Om du har frågor eller funderingar, vänligen maila Susanne.Wetterstrand@postnord.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

 Här kan du läsa mer om våra fackliga kontakter

title: Partnership Manager - Consulting
description:
**About Us** 




 Velory empowers companies to automate and secure IT asset management in one seamless platform. From purchase to end-of-life, our software ensures complete control over IT assets with a sustainable, circular approach.
 



  





 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
 



  





 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value. Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
 



  





 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
 



  





**About The Role** 




**Your mission is clear:** 




 Build the consulting partnership category at Velory. Define the offer, shape the pitch and close flagship partners - the Big 4, top-tier strategy firms, and global system integrators - that turn consulting into a meaningful revenue engine.
 



  





**This includes:** 



* Build the consulting offer from the ground up - from the pitch to the commercial model
* Identify and prioritise leading global consulting firms and key practices within them
* Build relationships at partner and practice-lead level across complex global, regional and practice structures
* Own the full deal cycle, leading enterprise sales cycles to signed agreements
* Position Velory as the operating platform behind the firm's AI and transformation work, leading with AI governance and connecting it to IT, HR, employee experience, operations and sustainability
* Co-create offerings with partners - AI governance frameworks, agent lifecycle models and workforce transformation programs
* Build a repeatable consulting playbook that scales across firms and markets
* Bring insights from partner conversations into product, pricing, and go-to-market



  





**What success looks like:** 



* A clear, repeatable consulting offer and pitch that wins at partner level
* Signed flagship partners across the Big 4, strategy firms, and global system integrators
* Multi-year, multi-market agreements that establish consulting as a meaningful revenue stream



  





**Required Skills** 



* 8+ years in enterprise SaaS sales, consulting, or a commercial role inside a consulting firm
* Proven track record closing large, complex enterprise deals
* Experience selling to or working with global consulting firms
* Experience building a new offer or go-to-market motion from the ground up
* Credibility at C-level in conversations about AI adoption and enterprise transformation
* Fluent in English



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Direct experience from a Big 4, top-tier strategy firm, or global system integrator
* Background in AI, digital workplace, or IT lifecycle transformation
* Experience from a scale-up environment
* Additional European languages



  





**Who You Are** 




 To excel in this role, you should embody Velory's core values and bring a creative, innovative spirit to our team:
 


* Show ownership: Look at the big picture and take the initiative to contribute where needed.
* Manage speed: Eliminate obstacles to maintain a high, sustainable pace.
* Represent quality: Aim high, sweat the details, and iterate.
* Earn trust: Be communicative, transparent, and follow through on commitments.
* Deliver wow: Go beyond expectations in a creative and unexpected way.



  





**What We Offer** 



* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Daily breakfast buffet at the office.
* Workouts with PT at the office gym.
* Private healthcare insurance and a generous wellness grant.
* Six weeks of paid vacation and ITP1-level pension.
* Select your preferred equipment via our own Velory Platform.
* Stockholm HQ with remote flexibility



  





**Join Us** 




 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern - you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: AI Data Engineer
description:
Data och information är den viktigaste delen i våra AI-leveranser. Du kommer att vara den centrala personen för dataförsörjning och datakvalitet i hela AI-leveransen — och du jobbar tätt ihop med våra AI growth engineers för att skapa verkliga lösningar hos kunder
 **inom offentlig sektor, finans och energi.** 




  





**Din tekniska utgångspunkt** 





 Du kan datahantering och pipeline i grunden och kan tillämpa olika verktyg för att bygga och underhålla data ekosystemet som behövs för AI tillämpningar. Du besitter den
 
**djupgående kunskap** 
 som krävs för att bemästra nuet, samtidigt som du vill utvecklas med det som framtiden erbjuder.
 



  





**Vi tror att du har** 





 ➕ 4 års erfarenhet av arbete med dataplattformar, dataflöden eller data engineering
 





 ➕ Erfarenhet av strukturerad, ostrukturerad och syntetisk data — och hur de används olika i AI-sammanhang
 





 ➕ Erfarenhet av cloud miljöer
 





 ➕ Förmåga att röra dig mellan teknik och verksamhet
 





 ➕ Nyfikenhet kring AI, agenter och framtidens intelligenta system
 




  





**Hos oss:** 



* Spelar dina idéer roll
* Arbetar du nära både strategi och implementation
* Kan du bidra till avancerade AI-lösningar i praktik
* Hjälper du organisationer att transformeras genom AI
* Umgås du med ambitiösa och nyfikna människor



  






 Vi tror att Europa behöver en ny generation AI-drivna bolag.
 





 Och vi tror att Stockholm är en av platserna där det kommer att byggas.

title: Engineering Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As an
 **Engineering Manager** 
 at Legora, you’ll lead by example—hands-on in the code while guiding a talented team of engineers. You’ll architect and deliver features that make legal professionals’ lives easier, drive technical excellence, and help shape a product used by forward-thinking law firms around the world. This is a role for someone who loves to build, mentor, and scale both people and systems.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Design and implement end-to-end features across our fullstack platform
* Contribute directly to the codebase while supporting the growth of your team
* Lead architecture discussions and technical decision-making
* Ensure high standards in code quality, security, and performance
* Collaborate closely with Product and Design to ship value quickly and reliably
* Review code, give feedback, and mentor engineers at all levels
* Champion best practices in development, DevOps, and continuous improvement
* Work with Node.js, React, Azure, AWS and Kubernetes
* Work every day to ensure your team is healthy and efficient


**Who You Are**
- A seasoned fullstack or backend engineer with 1-3 years of leadership experience

- Comfortable being hands-on while also setting technical direction

- Skilled in building scalable products and owning complex systems end-to-end

- Strong communicator who leads with empathy and clarity

- Passionate about mentoring others and helping teams grow

- Confident working across backend, frontend, and infrastructure

- Curious, pragmatic, and always looking for smarter ways to build and deliver

- But most importantly, you are someone who:

* “Gets stuff done” and understands building a successful company isn’t always glamorous and takes hard work and long hours
* Proactively and independently solves the most burning problems
* Strives in a fast-paced environment where the answers aren’t always clear and processes are few
* Candidates will go through the same interview process as software engineering candidates (including a coding task and a technical interview), with additional interview steps at the end designed for the engineering manager role.
* This is a Stockholm-based, 5-day in-office role, we believe building together in person drives better outcomes.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As a Senior Site Reliability Engineer you'll join the founding SRE team in our Head Quarters, sitting within Foundations. You'll own critical services end-to-end and partner across engineering to raise the reliability bar for the entire platform, working closely with teams in Stockholm.
   

  

* This is a Stockholm -based, 5-day in-office role. We believe building together in person drives better outcomes.


**What You Will Be Doing**
* Build, ship, and operate foundational platform services with full ownership
* Build and maintain a high-signal observability stack (metrics, logs, traces) and translate signals into action
* Define and evolve SLIs/SLOs, alerting, and reliability reporting for critical systems
* Improve on-call and incident response, including escalation paths, coordination, and post-incident follow-ups
* Reduce toil through automation, better tooling, and improved system ergonomics
* Partner with product and platform engineers to design resilient systems and improve deployment safety


**Who You Are**
* Significant experience operating and improving production systems, including debugging under pressure and preventing repeat incidents
* Comfortable writing software and building automation to solve reliability problems
* Autonomous, with pride in the quality and resilience of the systems you ship and operate
* A systems thinker: failure modes, graceful degradation, and practical tradeoffs
* Strong observability, incident management, and on-call experience, as well as experience with cloud infrastructure and Kubernetes


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Platform Engineer - Cloud, Automation & AI
description:
Tobii is the global leader in eye tracking and a pioneer in attention computing. For more than 20 years, we have built technology that helps understand human attention and intent. Our technology is used by companies, universities, and research institutes around the world across areas such as gaming, XR, assistive tech, research, and automotive.
   

  

 Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, Tobii has offices across Europe, North America, and Asia, and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm (TOBII).
   

  

 We are now looking for a software engineer to join our team in Stockholm. This is an exciting and broad role where you will build stable and scalable cloud platforms for our engineering teams and products.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 As a Platform Engineer at Tobii, you will develop and operate the internal platforms and infrastructure that support our engineering organization. You will help create scalable, reliable, and easy-to-use development environments that enable teams to move faster with less operational complexity.
   

  

 A key part of the role is supporting large-scale compute and workloads. We operate infrastructure that handles hundreds of concurrent builds and distributed workloads, where scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency are critical.
   

  

 We think about internal platforms as products, with a strong focus on developer experience, usability, adoption, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**Your mission**
* Build and improve internal platforms, automation, and developer workflows across cloud environments
* Explore and implement AI-assisted engineering workflows and platform capabilities
* Improve scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency in distributed compute environments
* Collaborate closely with product engineering teams and operations to solve platform and infrastructure challenges


**We hope you have**
* Solid experience as a software engineer or platform engineer
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP
* Curiosity around AI-driven development workflows and modern engineering practices
* Interest in platform engineering, infrastructure, automation, and developer tooling
* Experience with Python/C++ or similar programming languages
* Experience with technologies such as Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, or similar tooling


**Who are you?**
 We hope you enjoy collaborating closely with others, sharing ideas, and contributing to a culture where people help each other grow. You are curious by nature and motivated by solving problems in a thoughtful and practical way. You like taking ownership and thrive in environments where continuous improvement is part of everyday work.
   

  

**Location**
 This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden, with a 60/40 hybrid work policy.
   

  

**The recruitment process**
 Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis. Please submit your application as soon as possible. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Cloud & Security Architect
description:
Vi söker fler Cloud & Security‑arkitekter som vill arbeta nära kund, affär och teknik - i uppdrag där säkerhet och skalbarhet är lika viktiga som användarupplevelse och värdeskapande. Hos oss får du tid, förtroende och rätt förutsättningar att bygga lösningar som håller över tid.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en trygg och långsiktig miljö där teamarbete, kvalitet och gemensamt ansvar står i fokus.
   

  

**Är du den vi söker?**
 Du är en person som trivs i gränslandet mellan cloud‑plattformar, arkitektur och säkerhet. Du gillar att:
   

  

* designa lösningar i Azure, AWS eller GCP
* arbeta med identitet, åtkomst, OIDC, OAuth2 och IAM
* lägga grunden för moderna cloud‑miljöer med DevSecOps i centrum
* bygga robusta CI/CD‑flöden och IaC‑lösningar
* vägleda utvecklingsteam i säkra och effektiva arbetssätt
* balansera affärsnytta med tekniska vägval


 Du behöver inte kunna allt - vi söker dig som är trygg, nyfiken och intresserad av helheten.
   

  

**Vad du kan arbeta med hos oss**
 Arbetsuppgifterna varierar beroende på uppdrag och profil, men kan inkludera:
   

  

**Cloud Architecture**
* design av skalbara och säkra arkitekturer i Azure, AWS eller GCP
* hybrid- och molnöverskridande arkitekturmönster
* strategiska vägval kring drift, resiliency och kostnadsoptimering


**Säkerhet & identitet**
* design av IDP‑lösningar (Azure AD B2C, Curity, IdentityServer)
* Zero Trust, least privilege, MFA och access‑strategier
* hotmodellering, riskbedömning och secure-by-design


**DevSecOps & modern plattform**
* Kubernetes, containers, serverless och mikroservicelandskap
* IaC med Bicep, Terraform, AWS CDK, ARM eller CloudFormation
* CI/CD‑pipelines som möjliggör snabb och trygg leverans


**Team- & leadroller**
* delivery lead, tech lead eller rådgivande roll mot kund
* guidning av team i goda DevSecOps‑praktiker
* utbildning och coachning i cloud, säkerhet och moderna arbetsmetoder


**Vilka vi tror att du är**
 Vi tror att du:
   

  

* gillar att samarbeta och kommunicera tydligt
* är trygg i komplexa miljöer och gillar att lösa problem tillsammans
* har en bas i utveckling och känner dig bekväm nära koden
* värderar kvalitet, struktur och långsiktighet
* är inkluderande, prestigelös och uppskattar en miljö där alla får bidra
* vill fortsätta lära dig — gärna inom AI, agentic programming eller nya plattformsmönster


 Hos oss behöver du inte passa in i en mall. Vi tror på olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och perspektiv - och vi vill att du ska kunna växa på ditt sätt.
   

  

**Trygga uppdrag där din kompetens behövs på riktigt**
 Som Cloud & Security Architect hos oss får du arbeta i uppdrag som är:
   

  

* affärskritiska – där säkerhet och tillgänglighet är avgörande
* långsiktiga – med tid att bygga lösningar som håller
* moderna – med cloud‑, AI‑ och DevSecOps‑teknik i frontlinjen
* stabila – med erfarna team och nöjda kunder


 Vi matchar dig utifrån vad du kan och vart du vill - inte mot första lediga uppdrag.
   

  

**🚀 Vi satsar på dig**
 Hos oss får du:
   

  

* kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och certifieringar
* en kultur av kunskapsdelning, trygghet och gemenskap
* interna kompetensdagar, tekniska forum och föreläsningsmöjligheter
* erfarna kollegor som gärna stöttar och delar sin expertis
* möjlighet att forma både teknik och arbetssätt i uppdrag


 Här får du vara både tekniskt vass och mänskligt nyfiken - vi tror att kombinationen behövs för att skapa framtidens säkra digitala lösningar.
   

  

 💚
 **Om oss**
 Omegapoint är norra Europas ledande konsultbolag inom säker digital innovation. Vi är över 800 medarbetare i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Örebro, Västerås, Enköping, Uppsala och Umeå.

title: Enterprise Architect – Credit & Banking (Mainframe, Integration & Modernization)
description:
CGI is looking for a senior Enterprise Architect to strengthen our Banking & Financial Services practice in Stockholm. The role focuses on Credit and core banking platforms, with a strong emphasis on Mainframe systems, enterprise integration, and modernization.
   

  

 You will work closely with our clients to define future IT direction, ensure architectural coherence, and support long-term transformation initiatives. The role combines strategic advisory responsibilities with a solid technical foundation, in line with Nordic values of trust, pragmatism, and collaboration.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

* Collaborate with senior stakeholders to define IT vision and target-state architecture
* Translate business needs, regulatory requirements, and risk considerations into architecture roadmaps
* Provide guidance on technology choices, modernization paths, and integration strategies
* Support architecture governance and cross-domain alignment
* Define enterprise architecture covering Mainframe and modern platforms
* Design and govern integration architectures (APIs, middleware, messaging, event-driven solutions)
* Support Mainframe modernization initiatives, including hybrid and incremental approaches
* Contribute to cloud and hybrid architecture adoption in regulated banking environments
* Ensure non-functional requirements such as security, resilience, scalability, and performance


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
* At least 15 years of experience in enterprise architecture within Banking / Financial Services
* Strong domain knowledge in Credit and core banking
* Proven experience with Mainframe technologies (z/OS, COBOL, CICS, DB2)
* Experience integrating legacy platforms with modern architectures
* Familiarity with enterprise architecture frameworks (e.g. TOGAF)
* Strong communication skills and experience working with senior stakeholders


**Want to Learn More?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! Applications will be reviewed continuously, and the position may be filled before the final application deadline. For further information about this position, please contact the Hiring Manager Niriksha Shetty niriksha.shetty@cgi.com
   

  

****What CGI Offers****
* Long-term and trusted client relationships
* Assignments with real impact in the Nordic banking sector
* Collaborative, respectful, and inclusive work culture
* Opportunities for continuous learning and professional development
* Competitive compensation and benefits


**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Interim: Product Manager SaaS, Stockholm
description:
**Utveckla och driv en SaaS-portfölj hos Ada Digitals kund i Stockholm som Interim Product Manager i ett konsultuppdrag.**
 Vill du ta en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av en modern mjukvaruportfölj där affär, produkt och marknad möts? Nu söker Ada Digital en Interim Product Manager för ett konsultuppdrag på 18 månader hos vår kund i Stockholm. Vår kund är ett internationellt retail tech-bolag som utvecklar digitala lösningar för detaljhandeln och hjälper butikskedjor världen över att effektivisera processer, förbättra kundupplevelsen och skapa smartare butiker. Bolaget är en etablerad aktör inom sitt område med global närvaro och lösningar som används i över 80 länder. I rollen får du ett övergripande ansvar för att utveckla och genomföra strategin för kundens SaaS-portfölj. Du arbetar nära produktledning, marknad, försäljning och utveckling för att skapa attraktiva erbjudanden som genererar affärsvärde för både ku
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Det här är ett uppdrag för dig som vill påverka utvecklingen av en internationell verksamhets mjukvaruaffär och bidra till framtidens digitala erbjudanden.
   

  

* Ett konsultuppdrag på 18 månader med start omgående
* En nyckelroll med stort inflytande över SaaS-portföljens utveckling
* Möjlighet att påverka erbjudande, paketering och prissättning
* Nära samarbete med produktledning, marknad, försäljning och utveckling
* En internationell miljö med lösningar som används av ledande detaljhandelskedjor världen över


**Det här gör du hos oss**
* Definierar och vidareutvecklar mjukvaruportföljen tillsammans med Head of Product Management
* Driver genomförandet av portföljstrategin
* Utvecklar värdeerbjudande, kunderbjudande och produkterbjudande
* Ansvarar för paketering och prissättning av återkommande SaaS-intäkter
* Samlar in marknadsfeedback och omsätter insikter till kommersiella krav
* Prioriterar behov och krav tillsammans med Product Owners
* Utbildar och stöttar säljorganisationen kring erbjudande och portfölj
* Tar fram säljmaterial tillsammans med marknadsavdelningen
* Presenterar erbjudanden för kunder och partners
* Säkerställer en tydlig och enhetlig kommunikation kring mjukvaruportföljen


**Ditt team och arbetsplats**
 Som konsult via Ada Digital arbetar du hos vår kund i Stockholm. Kunden är ett börsnoterat, internationellt retail tech-bolag som utvecklar digitala lösningar för detaljhandeln. Med verksamhet i Europa, Nordamerika och Asien samt kunder i över 80 länder är bolaget en etablerad aktör inom digitalisering av butiksmiljöer.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära Head of Product Management och samarbetar med Product Owners, projektledare, marknadsavdelning, säljorganisation och externa partners. Rollen har många kontaktytor och ger dig möjlighet att påverka hur kundens mjukvaruerbjudande utvecklas, kommuniceras och skapar affärsvärde på en global marknad.
   

  

**Mer om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har minst 3–5 års erfarenhet som kommersiell Product Manager och som har arbetat i verksamheter där mjukvara och hårdvara samverkar. Du har erfarenhet av att utveckla, paketera och prissätta SaaS-erbjudanden samt en god förståelse för hur kommersiella behov omsätts till konkurrenskraftiga produkter och tjänster. Du har en kandidatexamen eller motsvarande utbildningsbakgrund och känner dig bekväm med att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt. Rollen kräver att du kan navigera mellan olika funktioner och skapa samsyn kring mål, prioriteringar och erbjudanden.
   

  

 För att lyckas i uppdraget är du initiativtagande, handlingskraftig och trivs i en miljö där arbetssätt och processer fortsätter att utvecklas. Du är förtroendeingivande i dialogen med olika intressenter och har mycket god kommunikativ förmåga, både muntligt och skriftligt. Du är van att presentera erbjudanden, utbilda organisationer och omvandla marknadsinsikter till affärsmässiga beslut och prioriteringar.
   

  

**Så här får vi kontakt**
 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag där du antingen blir anställd av oss på Ada Digital eller anlitas som underkonsult, beroende på vilken lösning som passar dig bäst. I tillsättningen strävar vi efter att ge dig en transparent, inkluderande och snabbrörlig rekryteringsupplevelse. Och vi vill veta mer om dig och din potential! För att ansöka behöver du inte bifoga några dokument. Skriv istället en kort motivering och bifoga din LinkedIn-profil. Urval kommer sker löpande och uppdraget kan bli tillsatt före sista ansökningsdatum. Är du nyfiken och vill veta mer innan du söker? Hör av dig till ansvarig rekryterare. Vi ser fram emot att få kontakt med dig!

title: Sr. Software Engineer – Ads Orchestration
description:
Reklamaffären finansierar TV4 och MTV:s streamingplattformar och högkvalitativt innehåll inom sport, nyheter och underhållning. Nu moderniserar vi hela kedjan, från hur reklamkampanjer säljs och bokas till hur de planeras, levereras, optimeras, mäts och följs upp. Vi konsoliderar systemen för TV4 Play och vår finska motsvarighet MTV Katsomo till en gemensam nordisk annonsplattform. På en snabbrörlig och föränderlig reklammarknad ersätter vi externa beroenden med egenutvecklade tjänster, vilket ger oss tydliga konkurrensfördelar: snabbare förändringstakt, bättre kontroll över data och flöden och en plattform som kan utvecklas i takt med affären över tid.
   

  

****Om Teamet****
 Ads Orchestration bygger och äger kärnan (plattformen) i ekosystemet som driver och orkestrerar annonsaffären med såväl interna som externa system. Vi tar ansvar för att hela ekosystemet kan leverera på tillförlitligt sätt – även när volymerna och kraven på transparens, resultat och effektivitet från våra annonsörer, partners och interna användare är höga.
   

  

 Som Sr. Software Engineer i teamet arbetar du i ett backend-nära, krossfunktionellt team med tydligt produktfokus mot många olika typer av stakeholders och business-partners. Du har ett brett tekniskt ansvar och bidrar till att forma och bygga framtidens annonsplattform.
   

  

****Ansvarsområden****
* Bygga och vidareutveckla skalbara backend-tjänster i en cloud-native modulär arkitektur som teamet designar och äger.
* Designa API:er och datakontrakt som andra team och system kan förlita sig på.
* Driva arkitekturbeslut och göra avvägningar mellan stabilitet, leveranstakt, kostnad och långsiktig förvaltning.
* Arbeta aktivt med AI-verktyg i utvecklingsprocessen (t.ex. Claude Code och OpenAI Codex) och hjälpa teamet att höja nivån på hur de används.
* Ta ansvar för driftsäkerhet: observability, monitorering, incidentlärande och kontinuerliga förbättringar.


 För att lyckas i rollen är du en erfaren fullstack engineer med tyngd inom backend. Du trivs i gränslandet mellan produkt och plattform och gillar att bygga system som andra förlitar sig på. Du ser AI som ett naturligt verktyg för att effektivisera utveckling och höja kvalitén i teamet.
   

  

****Vi söker dig som****
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av backendutveckling i moderna system och vana att leverera i produktion med höga krav på stabilitet och skalbarhet.
* Är van att arbeta med Node, TypeScript, React och molnbaserade lösningar.
* Ett ingenjörsmässigt tänk och förmåga att se helheten i tekniska lösningar, inklusive icke‑funktionella krav.
* Erfarenhet av cloud-miljö (gärna AWS) och att jobba nära drift och infrastruktur.
* Är en god kommunikatör och kan förklara komplexa koncept på ett enkelt vis.
* Har erfarenhet av snabbrörlig miljö med höga krav på självledarskap.
* Har anammat AI som verktyg för att lyfta din och ditt teams leverans.
* Nördar ner dig på riktigt när något fångar dig – oavsett om det handlar om distribuerade system, AI eller matlagning. Du blir rastlös när du slutar lära dig.


**Det är ett extra plus om du har:**
* Erfarenhet av domäner med komplexa flöden, flera integrationer och höga krav på spårbarhet (t.ex. annonsering, betalning, orderflöden, logistik).


**Nuvarande tech stack**
* Backend: Node, Typescript
* Frontend: React, React Native
* Moln: AWS
* Databaser: PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, OpenSearch/ElasticSearch
* DevOps & observability: GitHub Actions, Terraform, Grafana, OpenTelemetry
* Utvecklarverktyg: Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, CLI/MCP mot andra verktyg
* Produktivitet: Linear, Notion, Slack


****Vad TV4 erbjuder dig****
* Kort väg från idé till beslut i en senior tech-organisation med hög autonomi för team och individ.
* En kultur som värdesätter hållbara tekniska lösningar i en högtempo miljö.
* Du loggar ut på riktigt efter jobbet. Vi har dedikerad on-call med frivilligt deltagande och du förväntas inte vara tillgänglig utanför arbetstid.
* Fint kontor i TV4-huset (nära Gärdets tunnelbana) med gym, parkeringsgarage, restaurang och takterrass.
* Kollektivavtal, tjänstepension, försäkringar och friskvårdsbidrag.
* Valfri telefon och MacBook Pro samt rabatter via Benify.


**Praktisk info**
* TV4 är office-first. Vi arbetar på vårt kontor 4 dagar i veckan, men har flexibilitet för att få livet att gå ihop.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders provanställning.
* Facklig tillhörighet: Unionen. Kontakta unionen@tv4.se för frågor.
* Bakgrundskontroll ingår i processen.


 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Software Architect - Mobile
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management - and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Mobile Software Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will take the lead in designing scalable and performant mobile architecture for our suite of applications - primarily focused on iOS, with cross-functional knowledge of Android development considered a plus.
   

  

 You will collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to craft elegant and efficient solutions that support millions of users globally. This is a strategic and technical leadership role where your decisions will influence the long-term evolution of our mobile ecosystem.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and lead the mobile architecture strategy, ensuring a scalable and maintainable foundation across projects.
* Focus primarily on iOS architecture, libraries, and platform-specific patterns, while maintaining an understanding of Android frameworks.
* Collaborate with engineers, designers, and product managers to ensure architectural decisions align with product goals and user experience.
* Establish and enforce coding standards, design patterns, and performance guidelines.
* Lead architectural reviews and provide guidance on refactoring and scaling existing mobile applications.
* Design APIs, SDKs, and modular components that can be reused across teams.
* Guide decisions around third-party libraries, mobile tooling, and build/deployment pipelines.
* Partner with backend and cloud teams to ensure seamless integration between mobile apps and services.
* Stay current with the latest trends and best practices in mobile architecture, performance, and security.
* Mentor mobile engineers and help elevate the team’s technical proficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in mobile development with a strong architectural mindset.
* Deep expertise in iOS development using Swift (Objective-C knowledge is a plus).
* Solid understanding of UIKit, SwiftUI, Combine, and other modern iOS frameworks.
* Experience with app performance optimization, modularization, and offline-first strategies.
* Familiarity with Android development (Kotlin/Java) is a strong plus.
* Experience integrating with APIs, handling mobile data storage, caching, and background tasks.
* Strong knowledge of App Store submission, mobile security, and compliance guidelines.
* Experience with mobile CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and deployment automation.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain architectural concepts to both technical and non-technical team members.
* Passion for clean code, design patterns (MVVM, VIPER, etc.), and scalable architecture.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Senior Go Backend Engineer - Merchant Group
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 We’re looking for an experienced Software Engineer join our Go initative within the Merchant Group at Wolt! If you have a strong track record of building and maintaining scalable, production-grade systems you like to drive impact at scale and mentor juniors and peers - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Who We Are**
 The Merchant Group consists of 150+ engineers across 25+ cross-functional teams, working together to help merchants grow their businesses and streamline operations through innovative technology. Some of us focus on building seamless experiences for our merchants, while others work on the behind-the-scenes magic that makes everything run smoothly.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As a senior engineer in our group, you’ll work your magic in Go or Kotlin (and some Kotlin) helping shape how merchants succeed with Wolt. You’ll have opportunities to:
   

  

* Design, build, and scale reliable systems that power merchant experiences.
* Work across the full development lifecycle – from business logic and testing to cloud infrastructure and data streaming.
* Collaborate on architecture and technology choices that keep our systems simple, scalable, and efficient.
* Grow your skills and knowledge by working alongside experienced teammates in an environment that values learning and experimentation.


 How We Work
   

  

* Autonomy & Ownership – Our engineers have end-to-end responsibility for their services, from implementation to production.
* Collaboration – Architecture and working methods are defined together, ensuring we make the best choices for long-term success.
* Scalability & Simplicity – We value pragmatic solutions that keep our systems robust without unnecessary complexity. We use technologies that serve Wolt, our teams, and our engineers best. You’ll have the freedom to experiment and adopt the tools that work.


 Our Tech Stack
   

  

 Our core technologies include Go, as well as Kotlin (Ktor, Koin, Spring, gRPC), PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Kafka, Redis, GitHub Actions, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes.
   

  

 Why Join Us?
   

  

 Wolt is a place where you can learn, teach, and grow. If you’re passionate about building great technology and working in an environment that values teamwork and autonomy, we’d love to hear from you!
   

  

 📍This open role are based in our tech hubs in Berlin, Helsinki or Stockholm. We work in distributed teams, but might not be able to offer fully remote work or relocation.
   

  

 Our humble expectations
   

  

 We’re seeking an experienced Software Engineer, so we expect that you:
   

  

* Not only understand customer problems but can break them down into actionable steps for both yourself and the team. You balance short-term needs with long-term goals, creating high-quality, scalable solutions.
* Lead by example, setting high standards for work quality and managing projects effectively, even in uncertain situations. You take full ownership of your team’s work, making improvements that benefit both customers and colleagues. You regularly spot gaps and provide valuable recommendations to cross-functional partners.
* Are used to being a role model and informal leader, collaborating with partner teams and mentoring both juniors and peers.
* Are an excellent communicator, being succint and to the point.


 Next steps
   

  

 We are continuously reviewing applications, so don’t hesitate to apply today - you will hear back from us as soon as possible.
   

  

 You can read more about our recruitment process here.
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Senior Systemintegratör – IBM ACE
description:
Vi söker nu en erfaren Systemintegratör till ett långsiktigt uppdrag hos vår kund i Stockholm. Kunden ansvarar för organisationens integrationsplattform och behöver förstärka sitt team med senior kompetens inom integrationsutveckling, med fokus på IBM ACE.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Om uppdraget** 




 Du kommer att ingå i kundens integrationsgrupp som ansvarar för en verksamhetskritisk integrationsplattform. Integrationerna är ofta komplexa och verksamhetsnära, vilket ställer höga krav på teknisk kompetens, samarbetsförmåga och förståelse för större organisationers struktur och arbetssätt.
 



  





 Arbetet innebär att:
 


* Utveckla och förvalta integrationer i IBM ACE
* Arbeta i nära samarbete med verksamhet, arkitekter och andra utvecklare
* Delta i design, implementation och vidareutveckling av integrationslösningar
* Bidra till att driva integrationsarbetet framåt
* Successivt ta ett större ansvar inom integrationsområdet



 Uppdraget är långsiktigt och ger möjlighet att växa i ansvar över tid.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som är analytisk, lösningsorienterad och trivs med att arbeta i komplexa miljöer. Du är van att samarbeta i team, kommunicerar tydligt och har förmåga att ta ansvar och driva arbete framåt.
 



  





 Krav:
 


* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av integrationsutveckling med IBM ACE
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i rollen som Systemintegratör



  





 Meriterande kompetens:
 


* Erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig sektor
* Erfarenhet av liknande Dynamics-uppdrag inom större organisationer
* Minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet (de senaste 5 åren) av arbete med Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations
* Erfarenhet av liknande Dynamics-uppdrag
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom rättsväsendet



  





 Uppdraget kan komma att omfattas av säkerhetsskydd. Säkerhetsprövning och säkerhetsklassning kommer att genomföras innan uppdragsstart. Svenskt medborgarskap kan komma att krävas.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Senior Account Manager
description:
**Position**
 Senior Account Manager
   

  

**Job Description**
 Converge, a part of Arrow Electronics, is a full-service global supply chain partner. We are a team of creative, experienced problem-solvers who using connected distribution and our expertise is able to deliver all necessary resources and data intelligence to our business partners all over the world. We are the connected distributor with unique access, industry expertise and proven quality that can respond to urgent and specific needs and dynamic market conditions and the financial backing to provide terms that empower long-term growth. We are known for experience and market insight, as well as our up-front, proactive, responsive approach to service, and unwavering commitment to quality.
   

  

 If you would like more check our video Converge's Open Market Services - YouTube
   

  

 The Converge Sales Team is hiring a Senior Account Manager with a proven background in non‑franchised electronic component distribution. This is a fully sales‑driven, target‑oriented role designed for professionals who understand the realities of the independent electronics market — including spot buying, allocation shortages, end‑of‑life components, and fast‑moving demand.
   

  

 This position requires hands‑on experience within independent distribution.
   

  

 You will be responsible for acquiring new business, reactivating underpenetrated or neglected accounts, and growing strategic customer relationships across the
 **DACH or** 
**NORDIC** 
 region. You will act as a trusted commercial partner to customers who rely on alternative sourcing strategies and market intelligence.
   

  

 The position can be based in the Stockholm area (
 **NORDIC** 
 ) or anywhere across Germany (
 **DACH** 
 ).
   

  

**What will you be doing at Converge?**
* Enthusiastic and commercial mindset.
* Motivated self-starter attitude.
* A strong drive for new business — proactive in pursuing new opportunities and driving business growth.
* Proactively identify demand and supply opportunities for obsolete electronic components.
* Excellent communication skills and genuine enjoyment of phone calls and direct customer interaction.
* Rebuild and expand underdeveloped or inactive customer accounts.
* Actively source new business through targeted prospecting and market research.
* Develop pricing, quotations, and proposals aligned with independent market conditions.
* Manage the full order‑to‑invoice lifecycle, ensuring speed, accuracy, and customer satisfaction.
* Monitor market dynamics, pricing fluctuations, and availability in the global component market.
* Represent Converge at industry events and customer meetings to strengthen market presence.


**To be successful in this role, furthermore you need**
* Strong selling skills and ability to influence at all levels within external customers
* Customer-orientation and sympathy
* Prospecting and presentation skills
* Technical knowledge of the electronic components industry
* Energy, creativity, and focus
* for DACH: Excellent command of German and fluency in English
* for NORDIC: Excellent command of Swedish and fluency in English


**What You Will Get**
 A challenging role within a modern, progressive, and dynamic international organization where a strong team spirit is at the center of everything we do and where you can stretch your competencies and channel your talents. Opportunities to train and develop, explore new geographic regions/vertical markets, and travel within EMEA.
   

  

 Competitive compensation package consisting of base salary and variable commission.
   

  

 Trust‑based working culture with autonomy and accountability.
   

  

 Our motto is that “We Grow Together” and the pillars of our culture are “Growth, Trust and Pride” and this extends to all colleagues in Converge and Arrow, our suppliers, partners, and customers. Team players with the right fit to our core values, desire to work with the best in the industry and a drive to continually learn and develop will succeed.
   

  

**Location:**
 DE-Germany - Remote
   

  

**Time Type**
 Full time
   

  

**Job Category**
 Sales

title: Senior Backend Consultant Golang
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Expert-level knowledge of Go (Golang) and its core concepts (goroutines, channels, memory management).
* Extensive track record in senior backend engineering roles focused on distributed systems.
* Deep understanding of concurrency, data consistency, and fault tolerance under heavy load.
* Hands-on experience managing and scaling cloud-native infrastructure (Kubernetes).
* A strong production-first mindset with experience debugging complex issues in live environments.


**Meritorious**
* Experience building workflow engines, job schedulers, or state-management frameworks.
* Familiarity with major public cloud platforms (e.g., GCP) and event-driven architectures.
* Exposure to systems programming languages for performance-critical components.
* Background in building automated testing, benchmarking, or telemetry pipelines.


**Application deadline:** 
 05-06-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Software Engineer (Golang)
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, space consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, flight test services, satellite propulsion systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC Space also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

 Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey with us to help Earth benefit from space?
   

  

 If you answer yes to this question, we invite you to seize the opportunity to make a significant impact as Software Engineer in our team. We are looking for a dedicated person who shares our core values of Customer passion, Care, Collaboration, Curiosity, and Courage.
   

  

 The Software unit within SSC Connect is entrusted to develop and maintain critical systems required to connect our customers with their satellites. As our Software Engineer, you’ll develop and maintain the critical systems that keep our customers connected with their satellites every day.
   

  

**Requirements**
 We think that you care - about your systems, your colleagues, and your users. That you have a creative and analytical mindset. You take responsibility, drive your own initiatives, and can learn and process technical details quickly. We also think that you appreciate both working autonomously and together with other people.
   

  

 We believe you have a BSc or similar degree in Computer Science or Engineering and several years of experience in software development.
   

  

 To succeed in this role, you should have:
   

  

* Proven experience in Go development
* Proven experience with git
* Proven experience with unit testing and system test scripting
* Experience developing and deploying applications on cloud platforms
* Solid knowledge of Linux environments
* Excellent communication skills in English.


**We Also Value If You Have Experience With**
* Experience building scalable and reliable infrastructure on cloud platforms
* Knowledge of Kubernetes
* Experience with message bus technologies (RabbitMq, NATS, Kafka)
* API development experience (RESTful / JSON / XML)
* Familiarity with DevOps and CI/CD methodologies
* Experience with databases (SQL/NoSQL)
* Interest or experience within the space industry.


 You must hold EU citizenship and be able to travel occasionally.
   

  

 This role is also critical for our operational services and may include participation in an on-call rotation (up to one week per month).
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 We are seeking an experienced software engineer to:
   

  

* Build and maintain high-quality software for mission-critical applications.
* Advance automation in testing, deployment, and delivery.
* Enhance observability through monitoring, logging, and alerting solutions.
* Contribute to continuous improvement within our agile teams.
* Support live missions and ensure system reliability in production.


**Benefits**
**We offer you**
* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


 Additional benefits
   

  

* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


 LOCATION
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based at our office in either Solna or Kiruna.
   

  

 FURTHER INFORMATION
   

  

 For questions regarding the position, you are welcome to contact:
   

  

 Jenny Rudenstål, Global Software Engineering Manager: jenny.rudenstal@sscspace.com.
   

  

 For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

  

  

 NEXT STEP
   

  

 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-05-31, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.
   

  

 WE HELP EARTH BENEFIT FROM SPACE
   

  

 SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 700 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: IFS ERP Solution Architect
description:
At
 **Arcwide** 
 , we are more than just a consultancy. We are a team driven by
 **commitment, teamwork, excellence, and passion** 
 . As the largest
 **IFS Partner globally** 
 , we deliver world-class IFS Cloud solutions that transform businesses, and we’re on a mission to continue setting the standard for excellence.
   

  

 We are currently searching for motivated and dedicated individuals based in Sweden who are ready to take that next step of their career.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From The Role**
* Take ownership of designing end-to-end IFS Cloud solutions, ensuring they align with business requirements, best practice, and future scalability.
* Work closely with clients to understand their business processes and translate them into effective system designs and solution roadmaps.
* Provide leadership and direction during implementations, acting as a trusted advisor and subject matter expert across functional and technical streams.
* Collaborate with project managers, consultants, and technical teams to ensure smooth delivery of IFS solutions, including integration and data migration strategies.
* Stay at the forefront of IFS Cloud advancements and industry trends, advising clients on optimisation and innovation opportunities.
* Lead workshops, facilitate solution design sessions, and present complex concepts in a clear, business-friendly manner.
* Support pre-sales activities by shaping proposals and contributing to solution demonstrations.
* Mentor and guide more junior consultants, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and knowledge sharing.


**What We Will Look For In Your CV**
* Proven experience in architecting and delivering IFS Cloud (worked in an ERP implementation as Solution Architect or Lead Consultant).
* Strong understanding of key ERP modules such as Finance, Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Projects, Service Management, HCM, with the ability to design cross-functional solutions.
* Demonstrated capability in leading client-facing workshops, managing stakeholders, and shaping solution design at both strategic and operational levels.
* Technical appreciation of system integrations, data migration, and reporting tools within an IFS/ERP environment.
* Ability to translate business requirements into practical, scalable ERP solutions.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills, with a consultative and client-focused approach.
* Experience working within an ERP partner, consultancy, or complex enterprise environment is highly desirable.
* Willingness to travel as required to support project delivery and client engagement.
* Fluency in English is essential, and another Nordic language is required.


**Why You Will Enjoy Working At Arcwide**
* Competitive Salary - where you are rewarded for both your individual and company performance.
* Benefits Packages - you will also have access to excellent benefit packages including holidays, private healthcare insurance, pension contributions, wellness programmes, mobile phone and laptop, and much more!
* Hybrid working – where each team has autonomy to determine their in-person and remote working schedule.
* Continuous learning – we understand that it is imperative to invest in our people’s development and we ensure that you are always progressing in your career or learning development.
* Equal & inclusive culture – we are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where each individual feels they belong and can thrive in a work environment with a strong sense of community.


**About Arcwide**
 As the demand for IFS Cloud consulting continues to grow worldwide, Arcwide strategically positions itself as the largest preferred IFS partner by combining the world-class business consultancy of BearingPoint with the best-in-class cloud technology and innovation of IFS, to implement digital business transformation globally, delivering more value, faster. Arcwide is an IFS Platinum Channel & Services Partner that offers a full range of services and support to their customers worldwide. Arwcide has more than 500+ professionals in 23 offices in 16 countries, who collectively have hundreds of years of IFS experience in delivering business and technology transformations. To learn more about our company, click here.
   

  

**Equality And Inclusion**
 Arcwide is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where everyone feels they belong. Fostering a work environment with a strong sense of community and where everyone can thrive is a core pillar of our business. We are focused on attracting and retaining the best people with the right skills and the desire to deliver excellent results, regardless of background. In return, we will provide a working environment in which everyone feels valued and can fulfil their potential, where their talents are fully utilised and company goals are met. We celebrate the strength that comes from our similarities and our differences through local initiatives which promote inclusion, outreach, and respect.

title: Mjuvaruutvecklare mot försvarsindustrin
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Software Engineering
* ID 489134-en\_US

Världsledande inom ingenjörstjänster – vi samlar ett globalt team av ingenjörer, forskare och arkitekter för att hjälpa världens mest innovativa företag att frigöra sin fulla potential. Från självkörande bilar till livräddande robotar – våra experter inom digital och mjukvaruteknik tänker utanför ramarna och levererar unika FoU- och ingenjörstjänster inom alla branscher. Bli en del av oss för en karriär full av möjligheter. Där du kan göra skillnad. Där ingen dag är den andra lik.


Din roll  

Som mjukvaruutvecklare hos Capgemini Engineering kommer du att arbeta med avancerad teknologi med möjlighet till både lokala och globala projekt. Där kommer du få möjlighet att agera både rådgivare, innovatör och utvecklare mot våra slutkunder.  

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckeroll i*  

* Mjukvaruutveckling med tyngdpunkt på C/C++, Python, RTOS, och Linux.
* Agilt arbete och involvering i alla utvecklingsstadier och steg i processen när nya produkter och lösningar ska fram och att arbeta tätt tillsammans med andra.
* Varierande uppdrag och projekt, men du kommer alltid att ha en viktig roll i våra snabbrörliga utvecklingsteam som utmanar gamla sanningar och tar både produkter och kunder till nästa nivå.

  

Din profil  

* Master/Civilingenjör inom relevant område.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet inom C/C++.
* Erfarenhet av systemdesign, säkerhetskritisk utveckling, realtidssystem (RTOS), Linux, Yocto, debugging, test och verifiering, Python, Java, Ada, AI mot target / on edge.
* Erfarenhet från några av de vanligaste kommunikationsprotokollen för embedded exempelvis TCP/IP, SPI, I2C, CAN.
* Erfarenhet från system för versionshantering, så som Git, och continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD).
* Flytande i svenska och engelska i både tal och i skrift.

  

Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas hos oss  

* Spännande uppdrag med cutting-edge teknologi. Både inom Sverige och globala projekt
* Tydlig karriärplan med skräddarsydda utvecklingsmöjligheter genom Capgemini Engineering Academy
* Flexibla arbetsvillkor och konkurrenskraftiga förmåner
* Kollektivavtal som säkerställer dina anställningsvillkor

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted. Observera att identitets- och bakgrundskontroller kan genomföras som en del av rekryteringsprocessen.*
Om Capgemini  

Capgemini är en global partner inom affärs- och tekniktransformation som hjälper organisationer att påskynda övergången till en digital och hållbar värld, och samtidigt gör skillnad för företag och samhälle. Det är en ansvarsfull och mångsidig organisation med 340 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Med ett starkt arv som sträcker sig över 55 år tillbaka har Capgemini sina kunders förtroende att hjälpa dem frigöra värdet av teknik för att tillgodose hela deras affärsbehov. Capgemini levererar helhetslösningar som utnyttjar styrkan från strategi och design till teknik. Allt drivet av en marknadsledande kapacitet inom AI, generativ AI, moln och data, kombinerat med en djup branschexpertis och ett ekosystem av partners. År 2024 rapporterade Capgemini Group globala intäkter på 22,1 miljarder euro.Get The Future You Want | www.capgemini.com
